programme.title: First Blood

programme.title: Rambo: First Blood Part II
programme.desc: John Rambo is sent on assignment back to Southeast Asia to uncover evidence of still missing POWs, and ends up with his hands full when he comes up against Vietnamese soldiers still guarding the camps.

programme.title: Rambo III
programme.desc: Rambo refuses to join his friend and former mentor, Colonel Trautman, on a mission to Afghanistan. The mission fails and Trautman is captured by Russian troops. Now Rambo must infiltrate the Russian fortress to save his only friend.

programme.title: Hey Arnold!
programme.desc: Helga's Show/Flood: Helga does a standup routine at a school function and proceeds to insult all of her friends. They are offended, prompting her to change her act to a more friendly and gentle routine. She performs the new act, but it's boring.

programme.title: Hey Arnold!
programme.desc: Arnold and Helga perform a \"Romeo and Juliet\"- type play for a school production

programme.title: Hey Arnold!
programme.desc: At the Parent's Day competition, Arnold learns that even though he doesn't have \"real\" parents, his grandparents are just as good as everyone else's parents.

programme.title: Hey Arnold!: Eugene's Birthday/Stinky's Pumpkin
programme.desc: Eugene's Birthday: Arnold is the cause of two birthday party's for Eugene being a big flop. Stinky's Pumpkin: Stinky feels that he is a failure at everything he does until Arnold helps him discover that he is the best pumpkin grower in town.

programme.title: Hey Arnold!: Dinner for Four/Phoebe Skips
programme.desc: Dinner for Four: After winning coupons to a fancy French restaurant, Helga attempts to prove to Arnold that she is more sophisticated than Lila. Phoebe Skips: Helga is devastated when her patsy, Phoebe, is skipped to the 6th grade.

programme.title: Hey Arnold!: Full Moon/Student Teacher
programme.desc: Full moon: When the gang all decide that they are going to "moon" Principal Wartz, Arnold thinks that it's a bad idea, but ends up inadvertently getting caught and taking the blame. Student Teacher: Olga comes to PS 118 to be a student teacher.

programme.title: Hey Arnold!: Big Gino/Jamie O in Luv
programme.desc: Big Gino: Sid gets in over his head when doing business with the local kid loan shark, Big Gino. Jamie O in Luv: Gerald's big brother, Jamie O, falls for a girl and suddenly turns nice to his kid brother.

programme.title: Hey Arnold!: Beeper Queen/Oscar Can't Read?
programme.desc: Beeper Queen: Big Bob pulls his back and cannot go to a very important meeting. Not knowing who else to send in his place, he asks Helga. Oscar Can't Read?: When Arnold discovers that Oskar has been pretending to know how to read, Arnold confronts him.

programme.title: Hey Arnold!: The Headless Cabbie/Friday the 13th
programme.desc: The Headless Cabbie: Wolfgang dares Arnold and the gang to break superstitions, which causes a spate of bad luck to erupt. Friday the 13th: At a sleepover, Arnold and the boys sit around and tell scary stories.

programme.title: Hey Arnold!: Helga's Parrot/Chocolate Turtles
programme.desc: Helga's Parrot: Big Bob gets a pesky parrot he passes to Helga, who confides in it about Arnold. Chocolate Turtles: Arnold and Gerald sell chocolate turtles to fund their go-cart project.

programme.title: Hey Arnold!: Love and Cheese/Weighing Harold
programme.desc: Love and Cheese: Arnold goes all out to win Lila's affection by taking her to the Annual Cheese Festival. Weighing Harold: Harold feels that he has gotten too fat, so he gets his parents to send him on a weight-off cruise.

programme.title: Hey Arnold!: It Girl/Deconstructing Arnold
programme.desc: It Girl: Helga becomes the latest child fashion star and everyone loves her for her scowl and bad attitude. Deconstructing Arnold: The gang finally gets sick of Arnold's never-ending good advice, so they all decide to stop listening to him all together.

programme.title: Hey Arnold!: Grudge Match/Polishing Rhonda
programme.desc: Grudge Match: Arnold and Grandpa vs Helga and Big Bob in a fender bender blame game. Polishing Rhonda: Rhonda and Patty's rivalry heats up at finishing school.

programme.title: Hey Arnold!: Back to School/Egg Story
programme.desc: Back To School: Grandpa returns to grade school so he can finally fulfill his dream of graduating. Egg Story: Mr. Simmons gives the class an assignment to couple up and take care of an egg over the weekend to learn teamwork and responsibility.

programme.title: Hey Arnold!: Weird Cousin/Baby Oskar
programme.desc: Weird Cousin: Arnold's weird cousin, Arnie, arrives for a visit and appears to be the biggest loser to everyone except Lila, the love of Arnold's life. Baby Oskar: Oskar's wife Susie agrees to watch her cousin's baby, also named Oskar.

programme.title: Hey Arnold!: Helga Sleepwalks/Fighting Families
programme.desc: Helga Sleepwalks: Helga begins to sleepwalk and ends up walking to Arnold's house. Fighting Families: The Fighting Families Contest has come to town and have selected two families: one from PS 118 and PS 119.

programme.title: Hey Arnold!: Monkeyman!/Buses, Bikes, Subways
programme.desc: Monkeyman!: Arnold is saved from thugs by a mysterious, caped character named Monkeyman. Buses, Bikes, Subways: Out on a field trip, Harold and Helga miss the bus and get separated from the rest of the class.

programme.title: Hey Arnold!: Grandpa's Sister/Synchronized Swimming
programme.desc: Grandpa's sister: Mitzi arrives unexpectedly at the boarding house. Synchronized Swimming: Coach Wittenberg recruits Arnold's gang for a synchronized swim team.

programme.title: Hey Arnold!: Helga's Masquerade/Mr. Green Runs
programme.desc: Helga's Masquerade: When Helga realizes that Arnold is so taken by Lila because of her wit and charm, she decides that the only way to get Arnold to notice her is to be like Lila. Mr. Green Runs: Arnold helps Mr. Green run for the City Council.

programme.title: Hey Arnold!: Helga On The Couch
programme.desc: Helga is recommended for counseling after Mr. Simmons observes her berating Arnold, arguing with her parents, etc. She learns that unrequited love is very normal and that she's actually okay.

programme.title: Hey Arnold!: Dino Checks Out
programme.desc: Washed up balladeer Dino Spumoni fakes his own death in order to increase his record sales. Everyone believes he's dead and at the funeral, Grandpa and Arnold find out that Dino has left Arnold all his future record sales.

programme.title: Hey Arnold!: Summer Love
programme.desc: By complete coincidence, Arnold and Helga and family end up at the same beach resort for summer vacation. Helga is ecstatic until Arnold meets Summer, the girl of his dreams.

programme.title: Hey Arnold!
programme.desc: After a chilling vampire movie, Sid is so spooked that he believes that Stinky has all of the characteristics of a vampire. Olga comes home and wants to be a big sister to a little girl.

programme.title: Hey Arnold!
programme.desc: Gerald becomes addicted to a game called "The King." When Arnold notices that Gerald is avoiding him and making excuses regarding his whereabouts, he becomes suspicious. Arnold, Sid, Gerald, and Harold go on a fishing trip.

programme.title: Hey Arnold!
programme.desc: The guys find a bag of money and they want to split it up right away. But Arnold strongly suggests the honest route "to turn the money into the police and keep it if no one claims it."

programme.title: Hey Arnold!
programme.desc: When a new bully comes on the block, Wolfgang feels threatened that he will lose his power over Arnold and the gang. Phoebe breaks her leg when she rescues Helga from the pathway of a speeding bus.

programme.title: Hey Arnold!
programme.desc: Arnold tries to help Eugene get out of a tree but gets stuck himself. After a busy day at school of boasting and fashion policing, Rhonda comes home and finds out that they are now broke and have nothing left.

programme.title: Hey Arnold!
programme.desc: Helga loses her infamous locket and it winds up in the wrong place in Arnold's house. Sid learns that germs are on just about everything people touch and becomes so psychotic about hygiene that he wears a protective suit.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew Chicago

programme.title: Black Ink Crew Chicago
programme.desc: Ryan decides to throw a shop appreciation party in true Chicago summer fashion...on a yacht! While Kat takes some time away from the shop to think things through, the rest of the 9Mag crew lets loose. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew Chicago
programme.desc: Shocking news at Van's final court appearance leaves him wondering if he should run. Kat's enjoying her time away from 9 Mag, but when the girls fail to pay her a visit, she questions their loyalty. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew Chicago
programme.desc: With the death toll in Chicago at an all-time high, the 9Mag crew hosts an event to help victims of violent crimes. Meanwhile, in the Dominican Republic, Don tries to win Ashley back. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew Chicago
programme.desc: Ryan steps up his boss game. Kat betrays 9 Mag in order to take her Kat Tat brand to the next level. Don's old college fling claims that he's the father of her child, threatening his engagement to Ashley. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew Chicago
programme.desc: Kat learns that Charmaine threw her personal items in the trash. Don takes a paternity test hoping to squash the rumors that he fathered a love child. Van is released from boot camp but rising tensions put a damper on his homecoming. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew Chicago
programme.desc: Don's paternity test results send him on a downward spiral. Van has an emotional reunion with his daughter after being separated from her. Danielle's birthday celebration turns into chaos when Ashley and her friends attack Charmaine. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew Chicago

programme.title: Black Ink Crew Chicago
programme.desc: The crew heads to New Orleans for some Bourbon Street debauchery. Charmaine's family demands that she moves back home when they find out she's broke. Don is caught off guard when his baby mama Whitney ambushes him at 9 Mag. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew Chicago
programme.desc: Don brings his two baby mamas together in hopes of uniting his family. Ryan celebrates his 30th birthday with a Great Gatsby themed bash. And Danielle's boyfriend Terrence makes a fool of himself when his jealousy gets the best of him. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew Chicago
programme.desc: Don receives some life-shattering news. Charmaine auditions to be a radio DJ. Phor heads into the studio with one of hip hop's top rappers to record a song. Ryan is forced to make a tough decision about Cobra's future at 9 Mag. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew Chicago
programme.desc: Kat hosts her first art show, but Phor shows up with the woman he cheated on Kat with. Van confesses to his girl that he's not a one-woman kind of guy. Phor's girlfriend Nikki confronts Kat about her attitude —and things get physical. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew Chicago
programme.desc: The 9 Mag crew heads to the Dominican Republic for Don's wedding. Kat confronts Phor about cheating on her. Van's threesome goes wrong when his girlfriend brings a guest. Don gets too friendly with a stripper, jeopardizing his wedding. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew Chicago
programme.desc: Ashley enlists her brother to spy on Don's bachelor party. Terrence gives Danielle an ultimatum—him or 9 Mag. And Ashley threatens to call off the wedding when she sees scandalous photos of Don at his bachelor party. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Blue Bloods

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: After a woman voices her outrage regarding the NYPD's inability to find her son's murderer, Danny reexamines the case, upsetting the original detective, Erin, and Anthony, who didn't pursue the case due to lack of evidence.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: Danny and Baez race to find a missing girl who will die within 72 hours without her heart medication.

programme.title: Blue Bloods

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: Frank goes head-to-head with a data-tracking company when they refuse to unlock the phone of a terrorist that may hold information regarding upcoming targets.

programme.title: Blue Bloods

programme.title: Blue Bloods

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: Gormley looks to Danny and Baez for help tracking down a former NYPD detective he believes may be a threat to Frank's safety.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: While investigating a case involving a woman who shot her husband while she was drunk, Danny's instincts tell him there is more to the story.

programme.title: Blue Bloods

programme.title: Blue Bloods

programme.title: Blue Bloods

programme.desc: Hoss helps Charlie and Will (Charlotte and Willomina), two young girls who just lost their father. They go on a journey to find their only nearby relative, Aunt Cloe.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Hoss is seriously injured internally and Ben seeks help from the only doctor within 50 miles, who happens to be in prison for murder.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Adam's guitar-strumming friend, ranch hand Danny Morgan, is arrested on suspicion of murdering and robbing the Widow Baker.

programme.desc: Frank Medford, a figure from Ben's "wild, misspent youth", shows up in Virginia City, and though down on his luck, creates troubles for the Cartwrights by claiming to be a successful businessman.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: A vain outlaw murders a man in front of witnesses, including Joe, but a clever lawyer is able to get him acquitted.

programme.title: Bonanza

programme.title: Bonanza

programme.title: Bonanza

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: When Cochise falls on Joe, Ben cannot help but remember that is how Marie Cartwright was killed. He thinks back to meeting her in New Orleans in a rather confusing story not quite in synch with details discussed in "The First Born".

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: For a change, it is Adam rather than Joe who becomes mixed up in one of Hoss' funny exploits. Together they purchase a thoroughbred horse, and end up competing against their little brother in the big Virginia City race.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Adam takes a shine to Rebecca Kaufman, the daughter of a Jewish peddler, and bandits are convinced the Kaufman wagon is worth robbing.

programme.title: Bonanza

programme.desc: Classic comedy in which Hoss first meets prospector Obie and his lazy but allegedly brilliant mongrel dog, Walter.

programme.title: Love Island
programme.desc: The Islanders who are safe from America's vote choose one girl and one boy to dump from Fiji; Sarah Hyland returns as Casa Amor begins; the current couples are tested when they're split into two villas with sexy new singles.

programme.title: Love Island
programme.desc: The Islanders welcome seven new single girls to the villa, while Casa Amor plays a game of "Truth or Dare" and gets to know the six new boys; new connections start to form and conversations get steamy.

programme.desc: Casa Amor takes on the villa in a game of "Shaking Things Up," where cocktails are made and passed down the line in each other's mouths; one boy is invited on a date but the girl who joins him is not who he is expecting to see.

programme.title: Love Island
programme.desc: Casa Amor and the villa play "Raunchy Races," a series of dares which sees the Islanders getting steamy and where the naughty behavior doesn't end with the game; Kassy is torn between staying in her current couple or starting something new.

programme.title: Love Island
programme.desc: The Hideaways in the villa and Casa Amor open for two couples excited to spend time alone together; emotions run high in Casa Amor when the girls receive a video message from the villa.

programme.title: Love Island
programme.desc: All the big stories and behind-the-scenes antics from the villa and Casa Amor, as narrator Iain Stirling reveals the very best unseen action from Week 4, including outtakes from when Maura Higgins played "Face Facts" with the Islanders.

programme.title: Love Island
programme.desc: Casa Amor ends; the Islanders must decide whether to stay loyal and maintain their current relationships or recouple with someone new; the girls confront the boys about what they saw in the video message.

programme.title: Love Island
programme.desc: Tensions reach a boiling point as the fallout from the recoupling leaves some Islanders torn over their decisions; friends rally around while Kay Kay and Kassy contemplate their relationships.

programme.title: Love Island
programme.desc: Carmen and Kenzo take to the water for their first date outside of the villa; the drama heats up as the Islanders attend "Movie Night" and find out what went on during Casa Amor.

programme.title: Love Island

programme.title: Love Island

programme.title: Love Island

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El equipo de NCIS investiga un accidente de F-18 y la posterior desaparición del piloto que operaba el avión. Además, McGee discute a regañadientes una decisión muy personal con sus compañeros de equipo.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Después de encontrar un cuerpo en el sitio de prueba de vehículos aéreos no tripulados, el equipo de NCIS debe determinar si la muerte fue un asesinato o un accidente.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Luego de que Torres y Bishop sean víctimas de un atropello y fuga, Torres lucha por su vida en la UCI.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: El juicio de Erin contra la famosa traficante de personas Chao Lin (Tia Carrera) se pone en peligro cuando el juez a cargo aparece muerto, y Danny y Baez deben investigar el crimen.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Frank recibe una orden de la alcaldesa para asistir a un desfile en honor a un hombre que estuvo en prisión por conspirar en un ataque contra la policía.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Danny y Baez investigan el caso de un detective que fue asesinado antes de testificar contra un criminal de carrera.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Danny y Baez investigan el asesinato de una madre soltera cuyo exesposo tiene un historial de violencia.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: El equipo viaja a Atlanta para investigar el asesinato de una mujer, descubriendo que el criminal no trabaja solo.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Varias parejas que están en proceso de adoptar niños en Seattle empiezan a ser asesinadas. La UAC busca a un criminal que tiene un perfil muy pronunciado de instinto maternal, aunque asesino. Por otro lado, García tiene miedo de hablar con Kevin.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Un niño llamado Ángel aparece en medio del desierto con profundas cargas psicológicas al haber sido capturado por un psicópata. El niño no puede articular palabras, pero él es el único que puede dar una pista para salvar a otro niño desaparecido.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando una mujer en Oregon es encontrada muerta en un asilo, la UAC se da cuenta que la víctima es parte de una serie de asesinatos rituales góticos y que el asesino podría ser satanista.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Gibbs debe enfrentar la realidad de sus acciones después de ayudar a Ziva (Cote de Pablo) con “la única cosa” de la que dijo que tendría que encargarse antes de regresar con su familia.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers are called when a mother's job hunt takes a turn for the worse, and deputies confront a nervous man with a lot of bad habits.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A stolen truck drives against traffic during a pursuit. A DV suspect overdoses after fighting Deputies. An intoxicated father assaults his openly-gay son and hides behind a tree.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man apologizes profusely after leading an officer on a foot chase, a passenger in a car chase tells conflicting tales, and police find a wanted man on a roof.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers set up a sting designed to capture unsuspecting bicycle thieves. An Officer conducts a routine traffic stop on a vehicle with fraudulent tags. An officer pulls over a vehicle after observing a suspected prostitute enter the vehicle.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An officer finds a woman asleep at the wheel in the middle of a highway, deputies investigate a possible kidnapping, and a nervous driver just wants to be honest with police.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspicious man attempts to flee Police on foot and is later arrested for possession. Officers in New Jersey charge a garage owner with receiving stolen property. Officers arrest a man after witnesses report purse snatching.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: The victim of the home invasion robbery tells a dispatch operator that a man held him at gun-point. A man in a wheelchair is in a stand-off with campus police. Officers respond to a call about a knife-wielding assailant.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A distressed woman leads the cops to her abusive fiance, and a couple of officers are suspicious when they pull over an overly friendly man.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A woman claims a man abused her then put a curse on her. Police arrest a man for having illegal drugs on him. An elderly woman locks herself in the restroom at a bank.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man with a suspended license flees a routine traffic stop on foot. Deputies respond to a battered woman after receiving a 911 hang up call. A sting operation nets a suspected drug dealer.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A female shoplifter flees in a stolen box truck and crashes into a retaining wall. A green Honda runs in Wichita. A female passenger in Florida admits to hiding drugs and a pipe in her intimate area.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Fort Bend, Texas deputies arrest a man for possession of a crack pipe, and Michigan and Washington police both respond to domestic violence situations.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police pursue a stolen motorcycle that turns into a foot chase. A domestic violence call results in the arrest of an abusive stepdad. Officers respond after a fight over cigarettes escalate.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man has a hard time making his case when a bag of illicit items has his name on it. A talkative driver tells officers a long story with conflicting details. A couple calls for help when they find an alligator in their yard.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A couple assaults a tow lot employee who won't release their car, a suspicious man catches a patrol's attention, and police detain a carload of suspected shoplifters.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An officer tackles a masked man with an outstanding warrant, an erratic driver is stopped driving to a nail salon, and police respond to a domestic assault involving hot wax.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man suspected of shoplifting attempts to ditch his clothes, and officers respond to a dispute between a shopkeeper and a man suspected of paying with counterfeit money.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Stop sticks are deployed to intercept a vehicle with bullets. Two suspects watch their life unravel after being found with meth. Police assist young and restless runaways.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A young carjacking suspect in custody gets a tongue-lashing from his mom and aunt, a man terrorizing his mom gets tased, and police give chase to a familiar vehicle.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers coax a man off a large construction crane. An inebriated male suspect is jailed after an officer deduces that he had been abusive toward his girlfriend. A man is rescued from a flash flood, but his truck isn’t so lucky.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A boyfriend fights a man who’s just groped his girlfriend. Police make several drug related arrests while patrolling the streets of New Orleans on a particularly raucous evening. An adventurous suspect is arrested while scaling down a drainpipe.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A driver takes his unsuspecting passenger on a wild ride as he tries to evade police, a man's date is cut short by a traffic stop, and police are called to evict a roommate.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Detectives stop a vehicle leaving a known drug house and find a loaded concealed gun while searching one of the passengers. Local residents complain about a loud neighbor. A man is spotted walking down a road with a saw.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A decoy vehicle is strategically abandoned in a public parking lot. An officer responds to a burglary in progress call at a local tire store. Officers respond to a domestic call at a nearby trailer park.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers are assaulted by the brother of a suspect who is resisting arrest. A resident sprays water on his neighbor’s noisy dogs. Officers recover drugs and cash after pulling over a motorist.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers encounter dancing tourists on the Vegas Strip. An uncooperative spring breaker finds herself in cuffs. Surfers and lifeguards rescue swimmers from a riptide. A beachgoer lies about his age.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man on the run with a warrant tries to elude police by busting into a residence and hiding under a blanket, and a fleeing cyclist turns apologetic after being caught.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and his team investigate two murders that take place at the annual bull riding rodeo in Las Vegas.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and his team battle the flu when they are called upon by DDA Klein to investigate the deaths of several key witnesses for a grand jury case against a dangerous Las Vegas gang.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The disturbing death of a 3-year-old girl has a great impact on Catherine as she searches for clues to her murder.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Brass and Nick get help from an unlikely source, an incarcerated criminal (Method Man), when investigating two murders that take place in the same apartment building.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and his team discover several victims who have green blood, leading them to the conclusion that their deaths are somehow connected.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and the CSI team become involved in the world of Hollywood comedy when a diva sitcom star (Sagal) meets an untimely demise while filming her show in Las Vegas.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Warrick is accused of murdering a famous Vegas gangster, and even he is uncertain of his guilt or innocence.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Gil Grissom is the supervisor of the graveyard shift of Las Vegas' elite crime scene investigators. Holly Gribbs, fresh out of the academy, joins the team.

programme.title: CSI

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Ralph, the lady carpenter, runs away from home and stays with the Douglases after having a fight with her brother, Alf. While Oliver may never get his bedroom finished, he gains a maid as Ralph takes over as the Douglases' live-in housekeeper.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Picking apples while on a picnic, Oliver runs into the feisty Ira Hatch, the owner of the apple orchard. However, once back in town, Mr. Drucker tells Oliver that Hatch has been dead for years. An incredulous Oliver agrees to see a psychologist.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: After his elopement and cross-country honeymoon, Eb returns to Hooterville. But his new wife is nowhere to be found! After sending postcards from all across the country, Eb has to confess that his fiancé stood him up at the alter on their big day.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Someone has stolen $300 from Mr. Drucker's general store, and it looks like Eb is the culprit. How else could he have bought himself a new car that cost, you guessed it, exactly $300? But that is just the first twist of the many turns of this story.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Lisa's dreams come true, and so do Oliver's nightmares, when Eb discovers a runaway boy sleeping in the hay in their barn. Lisa is only too excited about the idea of having the sounds of platters of little feet around the house.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Arnold, the Ziffels' television-loving pig, has taken on a paper route to save enough money for a new color set. But when bank robbers show up and threaten his dreams, and Lisa and Oliver are held captive in their own home, Arnold has to fight back.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: The farmers of Hooterville are headed to France! Or at least they are if they can get organized. As part of an agricultural exchange program, the farmers are offered a chance to join a chartered government flight to Europe.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Love is in the air as the first day of spring arrives in Hooterville. And who better to lead the town in celebrating it than Lisa. She is resolved to show Oliver just what spring is all about and sets out to produce a Spring festival celebration.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: It's a hair-raising episode as Eb (Tom Lester) enrolls in a correspondence course to become a barber. Lisa (Eva Gabor) and Oliver (Eddie Albert) give him the money to learn the trade but learning how to cut hair by mail has its glitches.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Driven by a severe case of guilt, Maude extends a less than sincere invitation to her trying aunt Tinkie, but can't possibly be prepared for the suffering yet to come.

programme.title: Maude

programme.title: Maude

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: The liberated woman has no place in society...at least that is what Victoria Butterfield's father professes and Maude protests.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Maude's all-out campaign to get a well-deserved salary raise for one of Walter's female employees backfires when the lady decides to take the raise...and Walter, too. Marcia Rodd guest stars as Walter's overly liberated employee.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: The generation gap becomes the Grand Canyon when Maude agrees to chaperone Phillip's birthday party and comes face to face with today's youth.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Arthur instigates a doctors' strike, refusing to treat 'any' patients, but his convictions could prove to be very unhealthy when Walter and Vivian take ill.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Maude's up to her libido in sexual fantasies over a handsome government ecologist and Walter's up to his ears in jealousy.

programme.title: Maude

programme.title: Maude

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Archie becomes concerned when Edith begins attending Irene Lorenzo's church. Edith also begins wearing a Catholic medallion and gets literature on how to be Catholic. This leads Archie to believe that Irene is trying to convert Edith to Catholicism

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Mike and Gloria go away for the weekend and Edith leaves for a baby shower. Archie accidently locks himself in the basement. After finding a bottle of vodka, Archie spends a long night contemplating his life through the haze of a drunken stupor.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Wanting to try something new, Gloria buys a brunette wig and it immediately arouses Mike, who desperately tries to get Gloria to wear it while they make love. However, Gloria is insulted which leads to a big fight that lands Mike to sleeping on the couch.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: For her 25th wedding anniversary, Edith is planning a romantic second honeymoon getaway to Atlantic City, the same place they went on their first honeymoon.

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: A couple is caught by the mob for laundering money. When the husband is abducted and believed killed, Stone and Robins must protect the wife because she is the prime witness.

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: A frustrated teenage girl witnesses the mob killing the man who abused her mother. To hurt her family's reputation and humiliate her mother, she falsely claims responsibility for the crime.

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: Larry Wilson is a motorcycle cop who doesn't always use procedure. Instead he zeros on the point and rushes to it sometimes lacking caution. Stone is frustrated by the rambunctious officer, who happens also to be dating his daughter.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: Maria Ramos, the daughter of a despised Latin American dictator, is kidnapped near her University of Hawaii dormitory, and her father arrives in Honolulu within hours to oversee plans for her rescue.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: The murder of a printer and the discovery of a forged municipal bond send McGarrett to a documents expert for help in investigating a destructive ring of forgeries of government securities.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: Lew Ayres guest stars as Dr. Elias Haig, a nuclear physicist caught up in a brazen extortion scheme. The conspirators demand $100,000,000 cash from the government in exchange for their assurance not to blow up a portion of Honolulu with an atomic bomb.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: Comedian Jack Carter makes a rare television dramatic appearance when he guest stars as gambler Harry Foxton, the central figure in a macabre $240,000 lottery based on the projected hour of his death.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: Victor Buono guest stars as Eric Damien, an international thief, who enlists a carnival sleight-of-hand artist to steal a nickel valued by coin experts at $100,000.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: A daring bank robbery carried out under the cover of a mock military emergency sends McGarrett and his Five-O detectives to the windward side of Oahu.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Emotions run high when a black businessman (Randy Brooks) comes to Sparta to buy the town's newspaper, and it is suspected that he is romancing the paper's married white owner (Nana Visitor). Carroll O'Connor and Howard Rollins star.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Sparta is overjoyed when a local boy turned, successful businessman offers to bring new prosperity to the Mississippi hamlet by moving his business interests back home. But all of his business interests may not be exactly legal. (Part 1 of 2)

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night

programme.desc: With the field narrowed down to 119 women, the pressure is on. They must quickly learn a power pom routine and the famous kickline in order to perform it an hour later before the judges.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The veterans finally enter the audition process. Now all 83 women are judged head to head during a panel interview, a solo dance performance and on their appearance on the football field as seen and the big screen.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team

programme.desc: The Motor City brings John West, father of five sons, to the stage. The retired automotive line worker wants to retire in comfort and provide an even better future for his sons.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal
programme.desc: With 26 sealed briefcases full of varying amounts of cash, ranging from a penny to $1m – contestants decide whether to accept an offer of cash from ‘the Banker,’ in exchange for what might be contained in the contestant’s chosen briefcase.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal
programme.desc: With 26 sealed briefcases full of varying amounts of cash, ranging from a penny to $1m – contestants decide whether to accept an offer of cash from ‘the Banker,’ in exchange for what might be contained in the contestant’s chosen briefcase.

programme.title: Degrassi Junior High
programme.desc: Snake's older brother Glenn, an all-star athlete, returns home unexpectedly from medical school to tell his family that he is gay.

programme.title: Degrassi Junior High
programme.desc: Caitlin, the editor of Degrassi Digest, becomes interested in animal rights with Liz organizes a protest against scientific experiments on animals. But when Caitlin does some of her own research, she discovers that there are two sides to every story.

programme.title: Degrassi Junior High
programme.desc: A believer in astrology, Erica reads in her horoscope that romance in on the rise and promptly falls madly in love with Clutch.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: It’s prom time at Degrassi and in a last-minute shot to save his night, Drew plans an elaborate prom-posal.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Drew agrees to help Dallas salvage Prom and is punished.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Maya fails her CPR and now she can’t spend the summer lifeguarding at the beach with Zig.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Everyone’s spooked by Gloria’s disappearance as strange things continue to happen.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Determined to get to the bottom of Mr. Bane’s creepy info trove, Zoe and Grace break into his car only to discover more incriminating evidence.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Zoe attempts to ward off her feelings for an unlikely candidate by leaning into a romance a familiar face.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After months of flirting via e-mail, thirteen-year-old Emma's new love interest, Jordan, is going to be in town. Coincidentally (fatefully?), it's the same night as her mother's high school reunion.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After months of flirting via e-mail, thirteen year-old Emma's new love interest, Jordan, is going to be in town. Coincidentally (fatefully?), it's the same night as her mother's high school reunion.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Ashley has set her sights on becoming Degrassi's School President. Toby, spurred on by their awkward new situation as step-siblings, is frustrated by her unchallenged status and convinces JT to run against her.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Terri's sure that no guy will ever want her and she wants to skip the school dance. Spinner seems interested in her though, and Ashley and Paige convince her to let them make her over.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Toby can't stand the idea of Parents Night - the last time his divorced parents were in the same room they had a huge, embarrassing fight.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Ashley and Jimmy's eight-month anniversary is coming up - and so is the question of whether or not to have sex. Paige is playing Juliet opposite Jimmy's English-class Romeo and she's planting doubts in Ashley's mind.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Jimmy desperately wants to make the basketball team. But, surprisingly, it looks like Sean is surpassing him as a possible star player.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After a long absence overseas, Ashley's dad is back in town. She's enjoying his company and attention, but something tells her there's a piece of his life that's being kept from her.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Lacking real family time at home, Jimmy has been spending more and more time at Ashley's house. He and Toby are like brothers and Kate's begun referring to him as her "third kid".

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Recently diagnosed with a learning disorder, an embarrassed Liberty is ashamed to tell her friends about her tutoring sessions. Emma sees one of Liberty's private sessions and, putting two-and-two together with Liberty's suspicious behaviour, asks J.T.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: When Sean asks Emma what she's doing tonight, Emma's thrilled - that's a date, right? But nervous Sean is unable to muster the courage to arrange the details and Emma misunderstands his hesitancy as rejection.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: When Paige decides to start a Spirit Squad at Degrassi, Emma can't believe that the "sexist" sport of cheerleading is being revived. But Manny, who's had years of gymnastics training and is desperate for something to help make her "cool"

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Ashley's convinced that she and Terri are going to be the stars of the school talent show, singing her new (and incredibly earnest) ballad. Terri would rather add Paige -- and some fun sparkle -- to the act, but she's not sure how to tell Ashley that.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Faced with the pressure of passing Grade 7 on his second time around and his mother's newest threat to take him back to his unhappy life up north, Sean is beginning to slip into old, angry patterns.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Perfect Ashley is beginning to bore even herself. With their parents away for the weekend, Ashley decides to join Toby in breaking the "one-guest-each" rule and invites Paige and Hazel to join her and Terri.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Summer's over and the Degrassi kids are back…in droves. A neighbouring high school has been amalgamated with the Junior High and things are a bit of a zoo.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Summer's over and the Degrassi kids are back…in droves. A neighbouring high school has been amalgamated with the Junior High and things are a bit of a zoo.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: When Spike reveals the identity of the mystery man she's been dating, Emma is shocked. Mr. Simpson - her teacher! Emma claims she’s okay with it, but if that’s true, why is suddenly being so rude to Mr. Simpson?

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Rick decides to get back at his bullies, hitting them right where it hurts – their cars. But when Jimmy becomes a member of the “Whack Your Brain” team, the two form a truce.

programme.title: Monsters We Met
programme.desc: The Maori struggled for survival 1,000 years ago in a New Zealand populated by giant birds.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: Special effects-filled documentary beginning 49 million years ago. The world is heavily forested and birds rule the planet, preying on small mammals. Whales have not yet evolved and their ancestors walk on the land.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: A pregnant basilosaurus, an 18-metre, carnivorous whale which lives in the Tethys Sea, is forced to kill the young of a smaller whale to ensure the survival of her unborn calf.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: Going back 25 million years to the time of the indricothere, which was the largest mammal ever to live on dry land, being seven metres high and weighing 15 tons! The only threat to an adult would have been the hyaenadon which was the size of a rhino.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: The beginnings of mankind can be traced back 3.2 million years to Ethiopia and the advent of Australopithecus, a type of ape which, like humans, was bipedal. These early members of the human family faced many dangers, including the sabre-toothed cat.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: Revealing the exotic, oversized creatures that inhabited South America one million years ago, such as the deadly smilodon, the largest of all sabre tooth cats.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: Looking at the depths of the Ice Age, following a group of mammoths who have been forced to travel south with the advent of winter. On a dangerous journey across the Alps, many become trapped in bogs or fall victim to predators.

programme.title: Ancient Worlds
programme.desc: Starting in Uruk, the `mother of all cities', in southern Iraq, Richard travels to Syria, Egypt, Anatolia and Greece, tracing the birth and development of technology and culture.

programme.title: Ancient Worlds
programme.desc: Richard looks at the winners and losers of the great Bronze Age collapse, and the new powers that emerged in the harder-edged Age of Iron.

programme.title: Ancient Worlds
programme.desc: Richard Miles explores the power and the paradox of the `Greek Thing', a blossoming in art, philosophy and science that went hand-in-hand with political discord, social injustice and endless war.

programme.title: Ancient Worlds
programme.desc: In Richard Miles's epic story of civilisation, there have been plenty of examples of the great men of history, but none came close to the legend of Alexander of Macedon, known as `the Great'.

programme.title: Ancient Worlds
programme.desc: Archaeologist and historian Richard Miles examines the phenomenon of the Roman Republic, from its fratricidal mythical beginnings, with the legend of Romulus and Remus, to the all too real violence of its end.

programme.title: Ancient Worlds
programme.desc: The material benefits of the `good order' delivered by Roman rule provided its citizens and subjects with the security to ask profound questions about the meaning of life, questions that the Roman belief system was ill-equipped to answer.

programme.title: Ancient Voices
programme.desc: A dig hopes to excavate the 2000-year-old tomb of Qin Shihuang, China's First Emperor.

programme.title: Human Journey
programme.desc: Dr Alice Roberts visits the Arabian Desert to find clues as to how a tiny group left the African continent around 70,000 years ago.

programme.title: Human Journey
programme.desc: Dr Alice Roberts' journey continues into Asia in a quest to find out how early hunter-gatherers survived in the inhospitable Arctic region of Northern Siberia. Alice meets the nomadic Evenki people.

programme.title: Iron Resurrection
programme.desc: For his 50th birthday, a former pro wrestler restores a 1965 Ford Falcon.

programme.title: Iron Resurrection
programme.desc: A return customer's prized Chevy 5-window truck might be unsalvageable.

programme.title: Iron Resurrection
programme.desc: A '57 Chevy looks great, but the guys discover that looks can be deceiving.

programme.title: Iron Resurrection
programme.desc: Joe and the crew put the finishing touches on the big-block '57 Bel Air.

programme.title: Iron Resurrection
programme.desc: Joe and crew turn a salvaged '51 Chevy pickup into a Christmas spectacle.

programme.title: Iron Resurrection
programme.desc: Joe and the team finish up the '51 Chevy 3100 Christmas-parade truck.

programme.desc: Joe dusts off his '65 Pontiac Catalina to give it the facelift it deserves.

programme.desc: Updates continue on Joe's Catalina as a '41 DeSoto comes in for a chop.

programme.desc: When a client eyes Joe's '67 Nova, Joe offers to build an even better '66.

programme.desc: Joe and the crew button up the 1965 Riviera's wiring, interior and paint.

programme.desc: The Doctor discovers that the Daleks need Davros to break the stalemate in their war with the Movellans.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: Sarah finds a mysterious fossilized hand, which re-grows and begins to move.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The hand builds power and reacts to nuclear radiation, causing an overload situation.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The fossilized hand has regenerated into a Kastrian called Eldrad who appears to be female.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Doctor, Sarah and Harry return to Nerva, but at an earlier point in time.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: Eldrad reconfigures his body to its male form and states he will return to Earth to rule.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: Sarah is the latest victim of the space plague.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Cybermen who are intent on destroying Voga.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: Their plan to blow up Voga thwarted, the Cybermen intend to crash Nerva into the planet.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Doctor and Romana follow a distress signal to the jungle world of Chloris.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Doctor escapes Adrasta by going into the mine, but there's something lurking inside.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Doctor makes contact with the creature and realises that all is not as it seems.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The truth of Adrasta's scheme is revealed but a terrible retribution is already in motion.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: Arriving on Tara, Romana is taken prisoner by the scheming Count Grendel.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: Count Grendel is determined to become Tara's new monarch. Can the Doctor stop him?

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: As Romana escapes, the Doctor's life is put in danger by her android duplicate.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Doctor is determined to prevent Grendal from ruling over the planet Tara.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The TARDIS lands on a world where the inhabitants live in fear of the Three Who Rule.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Doctor and Romana are taken to the tower and meet the three mysterious rulers.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Doctor discovers that he is facing an unstoppable foe from Time Lord history.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Great Vampire begins to awaken from his long sleep...

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Two Chihuahuas who fight whenever they are in the same room; a dog who attempts to prevent his owner's boyfriend from leaving the house; a dog who is obsessed with moving water.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar revisits some of his toughest cases and explores the history or misunderstood dog breeds to dispel myths about aggression.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar comes the the aid of his good friend Dr Rick Garcia, a vet who is having trouble taming a terrier with epilepsy; Cesar helps a timid Rottweiler called Tank.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A close-knit community on Moorpar in California finds itself endangered by a collection of mischievous dogs, including three huskies.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar tries to restore the peace between a Chihuahua mix and a Mastiff, and tackles an out-of-control pit bull puppy.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: When Susan MacDonald met Cobar, an Australian koolie dog, she thought it would be a match made in heaven, but she was wrong; a Shar-Pei mix is afraid of his own reflection.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A wheaten terrier mix is so attached to her owner that she won't leave his side; a shar-pei who is aggressive towards other dogs.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: An English Bulldog who is destroying her owner's house and aggressive towards their other dog; Howie Mandel's chihuahua is aggressive towards him and his wife.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A border collie/greyhound mix with an aversion to other dogs; a woman tries to tame her dog's nervousness; a large dog with too much energy.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar helps Casey Anderson, of "Expedition Wild," and his wife, actress Missi Pyle, with their dogs; a pit bull's fears make him aggressive.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar joins forces with Jennifer McCarthy to examine the nature of wolf-dogs, the result of the cross-breeding of wolves and domestic dogs.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar helps actress Rhona Mitra curb her bulldog's violent tendencies; a newly-wed couples Chihuahua assumes dominance over their sheltie mix.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: NASA astronauts Suni Williams and Leland Melvin have worked on the International Space Station, but need Cesar's help with canine problems.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A human psychologist calls Cesar for help when her pet pug and pet pig fight; an emotionally scarred German shepherd.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: It's Beth's birthday and Dog knows just what she needs. He surprises Beth with Delilah, a puppy small enough to sit in the palm of her hand. Beth is so happy that she insists on taking the puppy with her on today's bounty.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: It's Halloween, and before Dog and Beth can help the kids carve their pumpkins, they have some business to attend to. It involves knocking on doors and meeting the neighbors, but instead of hunting for treats, they're on the search for a fugitive.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and the team have girl trouble in this case. Krystal jumped bail and seems to have vanished into the high plains of Colorado. To make matters worse, she's running with her lover (and bond co-signer) Carrie. But Thelma and Louise they ain't.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Today, Leland and Dog make a quick visit to the police supply store to get some new gadgets for the team. But they can't linger because they've also got a fugitive to catch. Their target is reputed to have an explosive temper.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When an offender, with a long record, ducks his day in court, Bobby Brown knows whom to call--The Dog!? And knowing that few souls can resist Beth's clever persuasion, Dog gives her the job of luring the fugitive in.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Today's case is a twofer, a brother and sister both charged with drug related offenses. Also, Dog has crossed paths with the brother before. He once tried to stop Dog from arresting one of the most violent fugitives of his career.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When a brother bondsman from Washington State calls Dog for help tracking a runner in search of fun in the sun on the tropical paradise of Kauai, the team gets on the case. Dog's only problem? No leads!

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and team help out a bondsman friend whose client jumped bail, but the target is a blank slate. Are his tattoos gang related? Is he likely to be violent? And making matters worse, when they hit his apartment, they learn he is moving out.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: They say you can't teach an old dog new tricks, but what if it's The Dog doing the teaching? Today's target is wanted on domestic abuse charges, but when Dog discovers she works for an escort service, he opts for a new twist on an old ruse.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Things get stressful when Dog and the team race to Honolulu International to catch a felon who's booked on an afternoon flight to Florida owing $140,000 to a bondsman.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: After Dog's son-in-law, Travis, signs off on an iffy bond and the accused turns into a fugitive, Dog and Beth decide to bring Travis on his first bounty. What better way to teach him than to show him just how hard it can be to bring in your man!

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog knows that it is better to give than to receive, so when a fellow bondsman grieving for his recently departed spouse requests his help, he jumps into action. While studying the fugitive's file, the team uncovers a surprising fact.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: No one becomes a bondsman overnight and even the members of Dog's team know there is always more to learn. So when Duane Lee cuts a felon a little too much slack about checking-in and then goes missing, Duane Lee knows he's gonna get schooled.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: What starts out as a perfect day for Dog turns ugly fast. He and Beth are enjoying helping their kids learn how to care for their new pets, when duty calls for a tough case. The charges: alleged cruelty to animals.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: In between tracking down a potentially dangerous ex-con facing a five-year stretch in the big house, Leland is struggling to find time to train and compete for his first boxing match in years.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and family head to Kona to track down a wanted father who's looking to bolt to the mainland to evade sentencing. Meanwhile, Dog does some evading of his own - Avoiding the much dreaded birthday party!

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and the team need to help Leland hunt down some elusive fugitives The case is a family affair with both mother and daughter in trouble with the law.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog knows that crime and drugs not only damage victims but also harm the families of the perpetrators, especially the kids. And both of the fugitives he's chasing today have left shattered families and struggling women in their wake.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Jim is a bondsman and longtime friend of Dog. Jim's son has just started in the family business. Today Jim has asked Dog to track down a potentially dangerous fugitive, and take his son along for some training with the best in the world.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and his posse head to Colorado for a special mission, to catch Marco, an alleged drug dealer. It's been ten months since Marco went on the lam, and his bondsman stands to lose his family business if Marco is not caught.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: The trail is hot and the stakes is high for Dog and the posse. The "Big Fish" in this case is Marco, an alleged drug dealer with a big bond. But a major key to catching him is Elizabeth, who is also a fugitive from the law.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: When Blake learns Steven's attorney Chris has moved in with his son, he vows to fight for custody of little Danny. Morgan Hess, Alexis' private investigator, asks his employer for a large sum of money to pay off a gambling debt.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Krystle and Alexis, trapped in a burning cabin far off in the woods, find the door has been locked--from the outside. Mark, who has come to see Krystle in this remote setting, dramatically rescues the two women, who are rushed to the hospital.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Mark is charged with attempted murder and arson; Alexis tells Blake and the police his motive was revenge. The other suspects-McVane, Hess and Adam, are questioned and released.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Alexis receives a note from the late Joseph--he set the fire with the intention of killing her; Claudia is released from the sanitarium; Steven and Blake fight over little Danny.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Kirby physically attacks Alexis, demanding to know the reason Joseph wanted her dead; at the trial for custody of little Danny, Alexis testifies against Blake, who erupts in anger.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: As the custody trial continues, Fallon testifies on her brother's behalf while Sammy Jo defames her ex-husband. Fallon leaves for Montana to investigate Adam's past; Claudia hits on the scheme for Steven to retain custody of his son.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Steven and Claudia marry, and the judge dismisses the custody suit; Blake offers Krystle a public relations job; Adam tricks Alexis into signing blank documents; Fallon and Jeff uncover evidence suggesting Adam may have poisoned Jeff.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Adam frames Alexis for the poisoning incident, and Blake threatens to take the story public; Mark attacks Krystle; Denver-Carrington's publicist Tracy is disappointed that Krystle has been appointed department head.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Jeff accuses Alexis of attempting to murder him and reclaims his stock; Mark is hired as Alexis' bodyguard; Dex Dexter, the son of a board member, proposes he and Alexis form a business alliance.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Dex continues his efforts to win Alexis; Jeff learns Adam raped Kirby; Krystle relishes her own publicity post; Fallon meets a dashing millionaire at the track.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Dex beats Alexis to an oil contract; Jeff confronts Adam about Kirby's pregnancy; Krystle accepts Blake's marriage proposal.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Dex beats Alexis to an oil contract; Jeff confronts Adam about Kirby's pregnancy; Krystle accepts Blake's marriage proposal.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Adam proposes marriage to Kirby, who intends to divorce Jeff; Tracy persuades Krystle to give her the company credit cards and confidential files; Peter makes a pass at Claudia; Krystle and Blake are remarried.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: A stranger greets little Danny by name; worried, Claudia moves the family into the mansion; Peter DeVilbis' architect hints at the playboy's drug problem; Kirby's hand swells uncontrollably.

programme.desc: From Nov. 9, 2025.

programme.title: Formula 1 Racing
programme.desc: The 2025 Formula One season comes down to a decisive Abu Dhabi Grand Prix. After winning in Qatar, four-time defending World Drivers' Champion Max Verstappen sits 12 points behind Lando Norris. Norris claims his first WDC title with a podium finish.

programme.title: Formula 1 Racing
programme.desc: From March 16, 2025.

programme.title: Formula 1 Racing
programme.desc: The Formula One grid rolls into Monza Circuit for the Italian Grand Prix. Oscar Piastri collected his seventh checkered flag of the year, and McLaren its 12th, at the Dutch Grand Prix on Aug. 31. Ferrari's Charles Leclerc won this race in 2024.

programme.title: Formula 1 Racing
programme.desc: Formula One heads to the Americas for the Miami Grand Prix. Oscar Piastri won for the third time this year at the Saudi Arabian Grand Prix in April. Piastri has finished inside the top 10 in 23 straight races since a 13th-place run in Miami in 2024.

programme.title: Formula 1 Racing
programme.desc: From Nov. 9, 2025.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: In the hospital awaiting a tonsillectomy, Jennifer fears she may never see her family again.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Elyse feels the need to expand her horizons.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: When Elyse has a convention speech in 'fascinating east coast resort' Atlantic City, she didn't plan to waste any time and money gambling.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: The news that their mother is pregnant sends the three Keaton kids into an angry outburst resulting in a family battle.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Alex is thrilled to be taking a college course taught by one of his personal heroes, Professor Ephraim Bronski. In his eagerness to impress the teacher he gets off to a bad start and is humiliated by his idol when he fails the first-class assignment.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Little Jennifer is thrilled about getting a visit from her former neighborhood pal, Scott, whom she hasn't seen in five years.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Alex reluctantly accepts a part-time job with his father at the non-profit station, and his dad is bursting with pride to have him following in his footsteps.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Mallory's enthusiasm for her part-time job at a boutique causes her grades to slip even lower than usual.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: As an economics student, Alex finds it demeaning to be forced into a public service position, but his experiences at the crisis center give him a new outlook on life.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: While Steven and Elyse are away on vacation, Mallory accidentally crashes her parents' car into a telephone pole. The kids need to raise money for auto repairs and decides to turn the Keaton house into a hotel.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Alex cannot accept the fact that he and everyone around him are growing up and desperately clings to his old ways.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Steven and Elyse plan a nostalgic weekend with the kids before the baby arrives, and are crushed to discover that the children are not at all interested in reminiscing about old times-they'd rather be with their friends.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Alex plays Cupid to help his shy pal Skippy get together with Jane, the girl of his dreams, but his good intentions go awry when the girl falls for him instead.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Steven gets depressed from interviewing frightfully inept candidates as housekeeper-nanny for the baby, such as a child-hater ad an ex-con.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Alex's chances for acceptance into a smug college fraternity are dependent upon him having a knockout date for the pledge dance.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Alex befriends Donna, a young, unwed expectant mother from Elyse's natural-childbirth class.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Mallory is crushed when her favorite aunt dies suddenly, but her feelings of sadness turn to anger when family and friends at the funeral seem to be taking Aunt Trudy's death too lightly.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Alex falls asleep while working on a college term paper on Thomas Jefferson and dreams that his family and friends are living 200 years ago.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: To help Steven during pledge week at the television station, the Keatons reluctantly agree to be part of the entertainment. The audience gets an unexpected show when Elyse goes into labor right on camera while in the middle of a song.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: A snowstorm prevents Elyse from getting to the hospital in time to deliver her baby.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Jennifer is jealous of the attention paid to Andrew.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Alex and his good friend James go into business together as tutors for their fellow students at Leland.

programme.title: Family Ties

programme.desc: The Ricardos and the Mertzes go with their neighbors, Ralph and Betty Ramsey, to the country club dance where a pretty visitor quickly convinces the men they are Romeos in disguise. They are each taken with Diana, the young beautiful cousin of a neighbor.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Suburbanite Lucy gets a green thumb and a competitive spirit. She has been raising tulips with a vengeance and wants to dethrone her neighbor Betty Ramsey for "Best Looking Garden" in the local garden club competition.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The town of Westport has commissioned a statue of a Minuteman to commemorate the Revolutionary War. The whole town is involved, from Fred who will serve as town crier to Ricky who will make the dedication speech.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: To celebrate the Mertzes' wedding anniversary, Fred and Ricky want to go to a prizefight, but the girls want to get dressed up and go to a nightclub. An argument ensues and Lucy threatens to find two other escorts if their husbands won't take them.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy decides Ricky's love is growing cold so she takes Ethel's advice she learned from a book, How to Keep the Honeymoon from Ending. Her attempt to dress up for breakfast doesn't yield any response from Ricky.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: One of the girls in Ricky's show quits, creating a vacancy which Lucy wants to fill. She goes down for an audition and can have the part provided she loses twelve ponds in four days to fit into the previous singer's size 12 outfit.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy is reading "The Mockingbird Murder Mystery" when Ethel reads her fortune and tells her death is near. Later she overhears a conversation between Ricky and his agent and she jumps to the wrong conclusion that he's trying to do away with her.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: When Ricky cuts off Lucy's allowance and charge accounts because of her careless spending, Lucy finds herself short of funds. Ethel has tickets to a radio quiz show that has a cash prize of $1,000.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Network television scouts are going to check out Ricky's band and Lucy tries to "get into the act" in order to be discovered as well. Of course Ricky will not hear of it.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy becomes interested in numerology and advises Ricky that it is a good day for him to make any deals he can. However, she soon realizes that she consulted the horoscope from yesterday's newspaper.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: When Ricky leaves his clothes around the living room, Lucy gets angry and divides the room in half so Ricky can be as messy as he likes - on his side!

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky brings home a $3,500 mink coat to be used in his nightclub act, and Lucy assumes it's her anniversary present. Trying to get the coat away from her becomes a problem because Lucy not only wears it while she does housework, she even sleeps in it.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ethel Mertz interprets a gossip column item to mean that Ricky is interested in one of the chorus girls in his nightclub. Ricky assures Lucy that it's just publicity.

programme.title: I Love Lucy

programme.title: I Love Lucy

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy buys a costly dress, and when Ricky tells her to take it back or pay for it herself, she decides to get a job. She answers an ad for a babysitter and finds herself in charge of high-spirited twin boys who are to appear in an amateur contest.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy's neighbor Miss Lewis has a crush on Mr. Ritter, the local grocer but istoo shy to invite him to dinner. Trying to play Cupid, Lucy invites him for her but he gets the idea that Lucy has fallen for him. Apparently Mr. Ritter is fond of Lucy as well.

programme.title: I Love Lucy

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky needs a ballet dancer and a burlesque comic for his club's new musical revue. Lucy wants the ballet gig and takes dance lessons from a strict instructor. Learning the disciplined art is much more difficult than she imagined.

programme.title: I Love Lucy

programme.desc: Lucy and Ethel are eager to get a closer look at the belongings of the O'Briens, new neighbors in the building. They snoop around in their apartment while they are away and when they hear the O'Briens return, Lucy is trapped in the closet.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En septiembre de 1997, un equipo de hombres cubiertos con máscaras asaltó una instalación de autos blindados en Los Ángeles, y escaparon con 18,9 millones de dólares, el mayor golpe en la historia de robos de los Estados Unidos.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En julio de 1996, dos hombres entraron en una casa de empeño en Birmingham, Alabama, y asesinaron sin piedad a los empleados. Para desconocimiento de los asesinos, una cámara secreta de vigilancia grabó el tiroteo.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En el condado Lincoln, Nebraska, un traficante de drogas fugitivo se involucró en un tiroteo con policías, hiriendo a dos de ellos, y evitó la captura después de una persecución a alta velocidad.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: Después de que un criminal con trayectoria cometiera un homicidio vehicular en Nueva Orleans, los agentes del FBI lo rastrearon por medio de sus hábitos y adicciones.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: A principios de los años ochenta, un par de ladrones en serie de bancos ganaron reputación entre las fuerzas de la ley como bandidos formidables.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En el verano de 1999, Texas fue aterrorizada por un asesino en serie que viajaba en tren. El FBI organizó una fuerza de tareas para reunir información sobre el viajero peligroso y crear un perfil que ayudara a localizarlo.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En octubre de 1987, un oficial de policía de Boston que respondió a una llamada por un altercado doméstico fue herido de muerte. Las autoridades hicieron una persecución a lo largo de la ciudad, pero solo pudieron encontrar las huellas del sospechoso.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En agosto de 1984, el hijo de un constructor exitoso de bienes raíces fue secuestrado en frente del negocio de su padre en Miami. Después de que el padre recibió la exigencia de un rescate de tres millones de dólares, el FBI se involucró.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En octubre de 1995, una familia de Carolina del Sur fue tomada de rehén como parte de un robo de banco bien planificado. La policía local rápidamente identificó a dos de los criminales, pero el autor demostró ser más evasivo.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En febrero de 1988, un vendedor de una disquera en Sandusky, Ohio, recibió un disparo mortal en su camioneta. Después de descubrir un bolso con miles de dólares dentro del vehículo, la policía supo que el robo no era el motivo.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En junio de 1973, una niña fue secuestrada de un parque estatal en el río Misuri mientras acampaba con su familia. Pasaron varios meses sin tener pistas, pero luego un agente del FBI tomó un interés particular en el caso.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En 1996, un grupo de políticos extremistas robaron dos veces un banco en Spokane, Washington, con el uso de bombas caseras y la precisión militar para escapar.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En agosto de 1992, un hombre regresó a su casa en Memphis y descubrió que su esposa estaba desaparecida. El esposo, así como sus amigos, sus familiares y vecinos, empezaron a recibir llamadas al azar.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En 1990 y 1991, la policía de Chicago y el FBI estaban tras el rastro de un ladrón de bancos cuyos asaltos se estaban tornando cada vez más violentos.
