programme.title: Atomic Betty
programme.desc: Betty's fearful trip to the dentist to deal with a cavity is interrupted when she is called off to save the galaxy from the evil alien baby Infantor, who is draining magma from planets to mold to create action figures.

programme.title: Kitty is not a Cat
programme.desc: When Kitty starts playing with an imaginary friend, the cats all decide to get imaginary friends of their own - to the detriment of their friendships with each other.

programme.title: Kitty is not a Cat
programme.desc: Cheeta and King Tubby set out to invent the latest “kids craze” using Kitty as a guinea pig, but despite all their crazy gadgets, she's content with a simple ball of yarn.

programme.title: Kitty is not a Cat
programme.desc: The household of cats are really struggling to put their heads together and work as a team, so Kitty tries to help them out by showing them some of the best team players on the planet - ants!

programme.title: Kitty is not a Cat
programme.desc: In trying to keep Kitty from catching the cat cold, the household of cats all catch it themselves! Now it's up to Kitty to take care of them.

programme.title: Atomic Betty
programme.desc: Betty battles evil space buccaneers (led by notorious pirate Greenbeard) in a search for intergalactic treasure, while on Earth, Noah accompanies Betty and her family on a visit to Betty's Uncle Charlie's farm.

programme.title: Atomic Betty
programme.desc: Maximus springs his father, a petty thief, out of jail. Max Sr. quickly reunites his old gang and Betty must stop the evil Maximuses from the biggest heist of all, stealing the Golden Yolk.

programme.title: Atomic Betty
programme.desc: Betty discovers that everyone, including Chaz, Noah, Duncan, and the Osborne twins, are flocking to downtown Moose Jaw in an attempt to be cast as extras in a new Hollywood space flick, starring starlet Delta Aurora as a space heroine.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Dragons Rising
programme.desc: Arin nurses Ras back to health as they continue his training, meanwhile their trail leads the Ninja into more danger.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Jay, Kai and Zane are interrogated by Iron Baron, the ruthless warlord to the Dragon Hunters. Feeling threatened, the Ninja choose to keep their identities secret.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: As the Ninja are put into a cage aboard a hunting party, they learn that their elemental powers will be used to help lure a dragon. Undercover, Cole learns Iron Baron is in search for Firstbourne’s nest – the Mother of All Dragons.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: After a flashback of when Jay first meets Master Wu, Jay awakens to find he’s still with his caged friends returning from their hunting party. Forced into slave labor, Jay’s inspired by his dream of his master when Wu told him to ‘build the impossible’.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Dareth warns his friends just as the Sons of Garmadon ambush their secret headquarters. The Elemental Masters are each captured, except for Lloyd, Nya, Dareth and Skylor, who escape within Nya’s escape vehicle.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: As Lloyd and his friends lick their wounds, Mystake shares how she managed to escape the Sons of Garmadon earlier -- she’s a shape-shifting Oni.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: In the wastelands, Faith teaches the Ninja how to master their chain rifles and they hunt a dragon. As teen Wu struggles, Kai encourages him to not give up in a lesson of confidence.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Harumi has outed Mystake as the ‘Fake Harumi’. Mystake reveals her true Oni form and battles Garmadon, allowing Skylor to absorb some of his power and escape. In the Realm of Oni and Dragon, the Ninja return to rescue Faith, only to discover it’s a trap.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Garmadon is enraged by the loss of Harumi and releases his wrath by ordering the Oni Titan to turn Ninjago City to ash. Lloyd fears they won’t be able to endure much longer – where are his friends?

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Atop their dragons, the Ninja return to Ninjago City amidst Garmadon’s vicious attack. Master Wu and the Ninja join up with Lloyd, Nya, and Dareth and they celebrate their reunion.

programme.title: LEGO Chima
programme.desc: Laval and Cragger attempt to get all the tribes to agree on a lasting peace in Chima, but Crooler creates a strange fog that makes everyone very powerful and angry, especially Cragger.

programme.title: LEGO Chima
programme.desc: Laval’s actions to break up the fighting at the peace talks force Lion King Lagravis to exile his son. Laval learns that Cragger has imprisoned his father in his absence. He must free him, but how can he do that when has been exiled?

programme.title: LEGO Chima
programme.desc: A strange black cloud has appeared around the floating Mt. Cavora, the source of the Chi. Laval and Eris investigate, but the cloud seems to fight back. The tribes of Chima will be all join in the fight against the black cloud. The worst is yet to come.

programme.title: LEGO Dreamzzz
programme.desc: The barrier to the Waking World has been torn and the Nightmare King invades Brooklyn, where the Dream Chasers must make their final stand!

programme.title: LEGO Dreamzzz
programme.desc: Missing Z-Blob, Mateo tries to free him to the neglect of his dream chaser duties while the team wrestles with an incursion case and a flock of unusual ravens ignites Izzie's suspicions.

programme.title: LEGO Dreamzzz
programme.desc: Oz takes the dream chasers to Castle Nocturnia to meet Grand Inspector Royce. Zoey heads to the Grim Realm to confront the Night Hunter and the rest of the team consults the enigmatic Sandman.

programme.title: LEGO Dreamzzz
programme.desc: When the Murky Realm disappears, a student's intense daydream results in dangerous sirens and the dream chasers must keep hapless students and teachers safe as Mateo faces pressure to meet his dad's new girlfriend.

programme.title: LEGO Dreamzzz
programme.desc: Wanting to prove himself as a serious musician to Zoey, Logan inadvertently unleashes his 'sick beats' on the dream world resulting in much mayhem.

programme.title: LEGO Dreamzzz
programme.desc: The dream chasers go after their missing memories and the dream chasers try find the Never Witch's hide-out while Phil covers for them at Castle Nocturnia.

programme.title: LEGO City Adventures
programme.desc: Mayor Fleck is running for re-election against R E Fendrich who will stop at nothing to win to use his new power to defeat Sinclair once and for all. When Duke loses his memory, Snake Rattler tricks him into believing he's Snake's criminal henchman.

programme.title: LEGO City Adventures
programme.desc: When Rooky discovers it's Chief Wheeler's birthday, she is determined to make it memorable. During the dedication ceremony of the city's deep-sea vessel to honor Duke, Freya, and Harl, the ship is accidentally set adrift.

programme.title: LEGO City Adventures
programme.desc: Harl attempts to prevent Tippy from bringing the fabled "Mars Door" back to Earth. Tippy Dorman, faces the trial of the century after his attempt to take over the world.

programme.title: LEGO Jurassic World
programme.desc: Owen falls prey to the toxin of a poisonous prehistoric jungle flower and believes he's a raptor!

programme.title: LEGO Jurassic World
programme.desc: Danny dons powerful dino-mech armor to dig up Cap'n No-Beard's treasure beneath Mt. Sibo, making him more than a match for our heroes ... and a mighty allosaurus that unexpectedly joins the party!

programme.title: LEGO Jurassic World
programme.desc: Hudson desperately recruits powerful help to defeat Danny once and for all ... in the form of the T-Rex!

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Dragons Rising: They Gather for the Feast
programme.desc: After earning invitations to the Tournament of Sources, the Ninja attend a banquet for Elemental Masters with friendly faces and old enemies, and Lloyd confronts a familiar face from his vision.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Dragons Rising: Inside the Maze
programme.desc: Arin continues his investigation into the missing Horns but makes time for Frak, who Sora suspects is working for Ras and Nya's first match pits her against Jay, still with no memory of their past.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Dragons Rising: United We Fall
programme.desc: In her match against Cinder, Wyldfyre's temper proves a liability in and out of the arena, and in order to stay in the Tournament, the Ninja invoke an ancient rule that requires them to compete in a race outside of Temple City.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Zane’s near demise at the hands of Mr. E forces the ninja to flee aboard the Bounty, where they discover that a transmission Zane intercepted may reveal the hidden location of the Quiet One.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: As Lloyd and Harumi venture deep into Primeval’s Eye in search of the third Oni Mask, the ninja attempt to fix the Bounty and make a startling discovery.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: As Lloyd and Harumi search the Oni Temple for the last mask, the ninja are taken hostage and discover Princess Harumi’s true intentions.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo se topa un con Genio quien le conceda varios deseos, mientras que el Noruego decide lanzarle una fiesta sorpresa de cumpleaños a Olaf para que recupere su infancia perdida.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: La compañía donde trabaja Gaspar atraviesa un recorte de personal pero el es de los pocos afortunados que se salva y es mandado a una capacitación a Estados Unidos, mientras que Peluzín toma el papel de Gaspar en México.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar atraviesa una crisis en su periodo de entrenamiento en Estados Unidos, mientras que el resto de la familia decide alcanzar a Gaspar

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego se enamora de la estatua de cera de Ivanka Trump y toda la familia decide hacer un viaje y atravesar todo el país en auto hasta Nueva York.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego decide ir a NY a conocer a la verdadera Ivanka pero en el camino el grupo se separa de el Abuelo y Peluzín.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego sigue con su plan de casarse con la Ivanka de cera, mientras que el Abuelo y Peluzín afianzan su relación después de su gran viaje

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: La familia va a Washington a pedir la mano de Ivanka con un resultado inesperado, mientras que Johnny busca deshacer la relación enfermiza entre el Abuelo y Peluzín.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego recibe la sorpresa que después de una muchos años de crímenes su papá le deja un jugoso botín como herencia, mientras que Jonathan y Ortega buscan a un adulto que los lleve a la premier de la película del momento.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego se muda a un lujoso departamento y se dedica a buscar a un nuevo roommate, mientras que El Abuelo y Jonathan se pelean por quedarse con el cuarto una vez que el Noruego dejo el departamento.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Jonathan es admitido a una reconocida escuela privada y Gaspar al no poder cubrir los gastos decide aventurarse con Peluzín en unos negocios turbios, mientras el Noruego busca consejos por parte de su familia porque no esta contento.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El abuelo se ahoga con un hueso de pollo y LFDB se ve forzada a buscar ayuda de emergencia, mientras que el Noruego y Peluzín deciden ingresar a un gimnasio y competir por los resultados.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo se involucra sentimentalmente con la nueva roommate del Noruego, la cual esconde un oscuro secreto, mientras tanto Peluzín y Jony buscan lanzar a Olaf al estrellato.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Tenta-Culo celebra su aniversario y hace una gran fiesta donde invita a todos, desafortunadamente durante el evento sucede un crimen y nadie puede salir hasta encontrar al responsable.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar y el Abuelo se topan con una familia muy peculiar, situación que el Abuelo busca aprovechar, mientras que Peluzín y Pitipu buscan curar a Don Sebas de una extraña adicción.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El noruego busca crear un vínculo de nuevo con su hijo Olaf por medio de un regalo, mientras que el Abuelo, Johnatan, Peluzín y todo el edificio están vueltos locos con los álbumes de estampitas del mundial 2018.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego cansado de que todo mundo lo busque solo por su dinero busca a Pitipú para que le ayude a idear un plan, mientras que Peluzín se embarca en el mundo de la robótica.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Ortega se va unos días a vivir con Jonathan y esto crea un conflicto con Olaf, mientras Irmita espera la visita de su prima a quien le esconde un gran secreto.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El edificio Pino es desalojado por causas de fuerza mayor y todos tienen que buscar donde vivir, mientras que el Abuelo se deja caer en una espiral descendente debido a su gran ego.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego está despilfarrando su fortuna peor que nunca, mientras que Pitipú, Don Sebas y Gaspar buscan solucionar el problema de plomería del edificio Pino.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego busca desesperadamente una forma para recuperar su fortuna, mientras que el Abuelo se hace adicto al videojuego de moda.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego todavía no puede asimilar que perdió toda su fortuna, mientras que el Abuelo malaconseja a Peluzín de cómo pagar la renta atrasada de su departamento.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Irma organiza un club de peleas clandestinas, mientras que Pitipú decepcionado de sus conocimientos Bíblicos, decide embarcarse en el camino del mal.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Pitipú busca ayudar a Don Sebas con su problema de peso, mientras que Peluzín y el Noruego buscan aprovecharse de un afamado cantante del edificio.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Un extraño virus se empieza a propagar, infectando a todos en el edificio, mientras que el Abuelo y Jonathan buscan revivir a Irmita después de que Peluzín la deja en coma.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El colegio organiza un viaje todo pagado a Acapulco para reforzar la relación "Padres e Hijos", y todos buscan colarse a esa vacación, así tengan hijos o no. Al final la vacación no resulta como esperaban.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego descubre por accidente que cuenta con poderes mentales y decide aprovecharlos para su conveniencia, mientras que el Diablo sube del inframundo para buscar un nuevo asistente en Peluzín.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo sufre un accidente y es llevado de emergencia al hospital pero no es posible la operación. Deciden esperar a que se cure solo, llevándose una sorpresa. Mientras tanto, Olaf decide pedirle ayuda escolar a Jonathan y termina por aprovecharse.

programme.desc: The death of a female embryologist at a fertility clinic leads Briscoe and Curtis on a search for a desperate killer.

programme.title: Law & Order

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Detectives feel a woman is withholding information when they probe the murder of her wealthy husband and very young daughter.

programme.title: Law & Order

programme.title: Law & Order

programme.title: Law & Order

programme.desc: Briscoe and Curtis investigate the murder of a police officer who was shot while on an undercover stakeout.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Detectives link the shooting of an investigative reporter to a sensationalized murder case, closed 20 years earlier.

programme.title: Law & Order

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Curtis investigate a corporate mogul's death, caused by an overdose of a drug that enhances sexual performance.

programme.title: Law & Order

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex VIP

programme.title: Matlock (1986)

programme.title: Matlock (1986)

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: What begins as a simple home burglary evolves into a very strange series of events for professional thief Kevin Gilliam.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: The church choir hits a sour note when parishioner Wally McDaniels, is accused of murder. McDaniels turns to fellow choir member Ben Matlock to prove his innocence.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: Amidst the beauty of a luxurious island mansion, a mystery game for charity quickly evolves into a puzzling murder when Matlock discovers the victim is really dead!

programme.title: Matlock (1986)

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: Thanks to Matlock, a struggling private investigator, played by guest star George Peppard, reunites with his long-lost daughter! Together they investigate a mysterious trail of clues to solve the toughest murder case of his career.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)

programme.desc: When young attorney Samuel J. Haskins argues his case in court, it's clear he's copying the unusual style of his idol, Ben Matlock. This is flattering until Sam and his girlfriend get tangled up in a blackmail and murder scheme.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy finally discovers the secret to knocking out a sandman, but it won’t matter unless Vivi and the rest of the Straw Hats can locate the Baroque Works bomber.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: While his mates search for a bomb, Luffy narrowly survives his second scrape with Crocodile. Across town, Nico Robin strong-arms Cobra into revealing his country’s greatest secret.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: With the walls crumbling down around them, Crocodile attacks Luffy with a poisoned pirate hook. Meanwhile, Vivi draws a bead on the bombers, but can she stop them in time?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Straw Hats team up to give Vivi one last shot at disarming the bomb that threatens to destroy her city. She succeeds in cutting the fuse, but Crocodile has a backup plan.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Pell’s sacrifice spares his beloved city, but only an act of god can stop the rebellion. With Crocodile’s poison coursing through his body, Luffy musters a final attack against Alabasta’s oppressor.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Crocodile is defeated, the rain has returned to Alabasta, and Vivi’s people are eager to rebuild their kingdom. As for the Straw Hats, they have a fleet of marines breathing down their necks.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Now that the rebellion is over, Vivi must make an important decision about her future. The Straw Hats are ready to hoist the anchor, but an ambiguous villain has stolen the Going Merry!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Mr. 2 is a man of many faces, but he finally shows his true colors when the marines attack the Straw Hats. Elsewhere, Vivi has a scheme up her sleeve, and it involves Igaram wearing a dress.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and his crew watch Alabasta fade into the distance, but there’s no time for reminiscing. The marines are in hot pursuit, and there’s a stowaway aboard the Going Merry!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Fresh off their adventure Alabasta, the Straw Hats discover an isolated island where they can restock their food supply. Chopper is left to guard the ship, but he and Nico spend the afternoon exploring instead!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: When a mail-order salesman gets lost at sea, Nami finds the paper she needs to start making maps. If the Straw Hat crew can somehow manage to survive a deadly cyclone, she might actually get some use out of it!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Heavy fog leads to a close encounter of the culinary kind when Nico fishes a marine out of the drink. The aspiring chef is concerned about the quality of his curry, and Sanji is just the guy to refine his recipe!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: A break in the rain provides the perfect opportunity for Usopp to help a young girl fulfill her dream of launching the world’s largest firework.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Money troubles force Zoro to tangle with Dick the Bandit and his treacherous gang of thugs. These gun-toting outlaws are terrorizing a peaceful village, and the Straw Hat swordsman aims to stop their reign of terror!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: A barrage of Marine cannon balls forces the Straw Hats to seek refuge on an uncharted island. Once ashore, the crew encounters a strange old man living amongst a herd of goats.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Old man Zenny made a fortune lending money to scallywags, but he always dreamed of becoming a pirate himself. When the marines set out to trap the Straw Hats, the wily hermit may finally get his wish!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Zenny gets more than he bargained for when he embarks on his maiden pirate voyage. The Straw Hats may have made a friend for life, but what are they gonna do about those pesky marines?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Straw Hats stop for supplies at a harbor town plagued by a mayor who taxes anything and everything. Over lunch, Luffy and Nico befriend a kooky scientist who’s obsessed with the Rainbow Mist.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy, Usopp, Nico, and Zoro get trapped in the Rainbow Mist along with Henzo. The aging scientist is looking for answers, the Straw Hats want treasure, and the ghosts who haunt the mist want them all to leave!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and his crew search for a way out of Ape’s Concert, but the Rainbow Mist is an inescapable maze of madness. Back on shore, Nami, Chopper, and Sanji face a lifetime of hard labor for failing to pay their taxes!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Nami enters the mist on a mission to save her mates – and maybe hunt for treasure while she’s at it. The local mayor wants her dead, but the Straw Hats are being protected by a mysterious marine.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The showdown with Mayor Wetton builds towards an explosive finale as the Straw Hats scramble to escape the Rainbow Mist – or be trapped inside forever.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Straw Hats are nearly crushed by the falling wreckage of a ship that’s over 200 years old. Could rumors of a floating island in the sky be true? Luffy, Zoro, and Sanji go scuba diving to find out!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Still searching for a route to the island in the sky, the Straw Hats chart a course for Jaya. Meanwhile, Fire-Fist Ace crashes a party aboard a vessel helmed by Buggy the Pirate!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Straw Hats drop anchor at a town overrun by scallywags, so Nami makes the boys swear to stay out of trouble. But when the Bellamy Pirates come looking for a fight, Luffy may have to break his promise!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Nico’s handy work unearths a solitary dreamer who may know the way to Sky Island. All Luffy and his crew have to do is survive the sonic onslaught of simian salvagers seeking to sink the Going Merry!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and his mates reach the home of Mont Blanc Cricket: the man with the key to reaching Sky Island. There’s just one tiny problem – he comes from a long line of legendary liars.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict
programme.desc: Liam (Robert Leeshock) and Renee (Jayne Heitmeyer) team up to rescue the Skrill Queen, who has been kidnapped by a group of renegade Volunteers.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict
programme.desc: Lili's (Lisa Howard) fate lies in Sandoval's (Von Flores) hands as political allegiances continue to shift.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict
programme.desc: Liam (Robert Leeshock) discovers Taelon technology being sold on the black market is the cause of inexplicable deaths.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict
programme.desc: Ancient Taelon artifacts smuggled into the United States lead to the discovery of Ma'el's ship.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict
programme.desc: Liam (Robert Leeshock) is framed for murder when he investigates the activities of a set of Taelon/human hybrid twins created years ago by Da'an (Leni Parker).

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict
programme.desc: Lili Marquette (Lisa Howard) falls victim to an elaborate Jaridian scheme that will forever alter the fate of the Earth.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict
programme.desc: Liam (Robert Leeshock) and Renee (Jayne Heitmeyer) discover Zo'or (Anita La Selva) and Sandoval's (Von Flores) plan to create perfect soldiers out of bio-surrogates to fight the Jaridians.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict
programme.desc: Liam (Robert Leeshock) and Renee (Jayne Heitmeyer) investigate a series of mysterious deaths involving a group of women, led by Sister Margaret (special guest star Marina Sirtis), that has the ability to spiritually bond with the Taelons.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict
programme.desc: A live television interview with Zo'or (Anita La Selva) goes awry when a news reporter airs secret Taelon tapes and embarks on a deadly mission that Liam (Robert Leeshock) must thwart.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict
programme.desc: Liam (Robert Leeshock) must decide whether to save the life of his enemy Zo'or (Anita La Selva), who suffers serious injuries after their shuttle crashes in a remote part of the United States.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict
programme.desc: Zo'or (Anita La Selva) and Sandoval (Von Flores) implement an elaborate plan to assassinate T'than (Michelle Nolden), the Taelon War Minister.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict
programme.desc: Liam (Robert Leeshock) and Renee (Jayne Heitmeyer) learn that the Taelons secretly inhabited the Earth during the SI War and used a weapon of mass destruction to further their cause.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict
programme.desc: Liam Kincaid (Robert Leeshock) races against the clock to find Zo'or (Anita La Selva), who disappears after contracting an ancient Taelon virus that has the potential to cause a devastating plague.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: A man is found dead in the shower, and police have only two suspects, but to figure out who killed him and why, is not as cut and dry as it may seem.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: A teenage girl is found beaten to death at the neighborhood pool, launching her father on a mission to catch her killer that ultimately changes crime fighting forever.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: A brutal attack leaves witness to a murder; but when the police find the killer, it turns out the intended victim, and the motive, were not what anyone imagined.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: When a prominent attorney is found savagely stabbed to death in her office, investigators find themselves with a long list of suspects from violent felons to lesbian love triangles; in the end, they find a killer as cold as they come.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: What originally looks like a heart attack turns out to be a calculated execution; soon, detectives unravel a murder plot that hits a little too close to home.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: After a woman is found shot dead, with her 9-month-old daughter in the next room, detectives uncover a web of late-night encounters, secret lovers and seething jealousy.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: A woman is found stabbed to death in her apartment; with a long list of admirers, investigators uncover secret obsessions leading to a sadistic killer suspected by no one.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: A single mother is strangled to death in the middle of a Hawaiian paradise; investigators quickly focus in on two suspects, but nothing comes easy as they spend more than a decade striving to bring her killer to justice.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: A retired couple are found beaten to death in their country club estate, but detectives soon discover that what happens in Vegas doesn't always stay there as they hunt down this monstrous killer.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: A young woman is stabbed to death and suspects include a warlock and a rumored Wiccan lover; the case goes unsolved for years, until a triple homicide leads investigators to a dark obsession that costs four people their lives.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: A local beauty queen is found dead in a lake; as her small town grieves, law enforcement finds itself on a 20-plus year investigation that leads to a killer who was hiding in plain sight.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: An apartment fire proves to be arson set to cover up the murder of a young woman, but the discovery of a secret double life and unique evidence leads detectives to the killer.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: A witness comes face to face with the killer of a small-town beautician, but despite having an eyewitness, it would take years and a surprise tip to lead detectives to who strangled a beloved member of the community.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: When a 4-year-old finds his great-grandparents melted, he runs for help, launching an investigation into their double murder; greed takes center stage as detectives unwind this heart-wrenching case that leads them to a suspect no one saw coming.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: A young woman disappears, leaving the community hoping for her safe return; when she is found murdered, a string of mysterious anonymous tips takes detectives into a toxic world of jealousy and obsession.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood

programme.desc: Narancia is unshakable as he uses firepower and CO2 detection to survive Formaggio’s body-shrinking attack. Even beneath a spider’s fangs inside Formaggio’s bottle, Narancia reveals not Trish’s whereabouts but the bullet holes his Stand has left behind.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: Giorno, Abbacchio and Fugo travel to Pompeii to find a hidden key pivotal in their protection of Trish. Facing the trio, however, is more than the lonely remains of ancient Roman villas and colonnades. Fugo spots an odd figure in an even stranger mirror.

programme.title: Hunter x Hunter
programme.desc: Feeling the need to lay a punch on Youpi to avenge his friend Shoot, Knuckle decides to take on Youpi once more.

programme.title: Hunter x Hunter
programme.desc: Ikalgo reads Palm's hidden message, which says that she has gone to the palace and to assume that she is dead if she does not respond before the start of the mission.

programme.title: Hunter x Hunter
programme.desc: Youpi is impressed by the extermination team's abilities and acknowledges their strength.

programme.title: Hunter x Hunter
programme.desc: Morel destroys the cocoon before him, but as he suspected, Pouf is not inside.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: The High Priestess, Part 2
programme.desc: The team attempts to escape the submarine with scuba gear as it sinks under attacks from the shape-changing enemy Stand "High Priestess."

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Iggy the Fool and Geb's N'doul, Part 1
programme.desc: Jotaro and his friends finally land in Egypt, where DIO awaits, and are cutting through the desert when a helicopter approaches. The helicopter belongs to the Speedwagon Foundation and is there to make a special delivery requested by Joseph.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Iggy the Fool and Geb's N'doul, Part 2
programme.desc: Jotaro and crew acquire the help of Iggy but are ambushed by a water Stand. With Kakyoin injured, Avdol tries out a stratagem which the unseen enemy quickly sees through. Meanwhile, Iggy is napping.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Khnum's Zenyatta and Thoth's Mondatta
programme.desc: After the battle with N'doul, Kakyoin and Avdol are badly hurt, so the group heads for a hospital in Aswan. Unfortunately, dangerous enemies could be all around them even there.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Anubis, Part 1
programme.desc: A young man named Chaka finds a mysterious sword on the beach. Though other men try, Chaka is the only one who can draw it. The sword claims Chaka as its master and sends the youth in pursuit of Jotaro and his friends with deadly intent.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Anubis, Part 2
programme.desc: Having defeated the "Anubis" Stand user Chaka, Polnareff pays a visit to a barber. But when the barber starts attacking him with Chaka's sword, the Frenchman realizes the sword itself is the Stand user.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Bast's Mariah, Part 1
programme.desc: On the way to Luxor, Joseph notices an electrical outlet set in a rock. Fascinated by the rare sight, Joseph goes in for a closer look and gets shocked. Though he seems fine afterward, soon all manner of small accidents begin to occur around him.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Bast's Mariah, Part 2
programme.desc: Due to the powers of an enemy Stand, Joseph's body becomes magnetized. While chasing after the woman he suspects is the Stand user, Joseph learns that Avdol has also become magnetized from touching a different electrical outlet.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Set's Alessi, Part 1
programme.desc: With Joseph and Avdol busy fighting Mariah, Jotaro and Polnareff get concerned about why they haven't shown up yet. As the two search Luxor, Polnareff senses someone following them and confronts the man.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Set's Alessi, Part 2
programme.desc: The power of Alessi's Stand "Set" has turned Polnareff back into a child, leaving him confused and alone. A passerby named Marena takes the boy into her home to help him, but they are followed by Alessi and his terrible powers.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: D'Arby the Gambler, Part 1
programme.desc: After a long journey, Jotaro and his friends finally reach Cairo. They begin asking about the location of DIO's palace and find one man who says he has information, but will only answer if the group can beat him in a game.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: D'Arby the Gambler, Part 2
programme.desc: After losing to D'Arby, Joseph and Polnareff have their souls taken. In order to have their souls returned, Jotaro shows off Star Platinum's powers before beginning a match with D'Arby, warning him that cheating won't work.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Hol Horse and Mondatta, Part 1
programme.desc: Hol Horse arrives at Cairo in order to pursue Jotaro and the others. He has joined forces with another partner and is after the lives of Jotaro and crew once more. What's more, his new partner is none other than Mondatta.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Hol Horse and Mondatta, Part 2
programme.desc: Following Mondatta's prediction, Hol Horse sticks his fingers into Polnareff's nose, but he doesn't know what to do from there. Making matters worse, Jotaro and the others show up in search of Polnareff, forcing Hol Horse into a tough spot.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: The Guardian of Hell, Pet Shop, Part 1
programme.desc: Jotaro and his friends continue to search for DIO's mansion in Cairo. Following Avdol's advice, they have a beggar look for the mansion and wait. Meanwhile, Iggy, wandering the city alone, is confronted by two large dogs.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: The Guardian of Hell, Pet Shop, Part 2
programme.desc: Iggy ends up in a battle to the death in the sewers against Pet Shop, the falcon that guards DIO's mansion. Despite being injured, Iggy runs to the river in an attempt to escape, but he may have underestimated Pet Shop's abilities.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: D'Arby the Player, Part 1
programme.desc: Though purchased dearly with Iggy's injury, Jotaro and his group finally have the location of DIO's palace. Waiting for them where they find the butler, Darby Younger, brother of the gambler they previously defeated.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: D'Arby the Player, Part 2
programme.desc: The battle for souls with D'Arby continues. Kakyoin challenges D'Arby to a racing game but ends up losing both the race and his soul. Before Joseph really has time to react, Jotaro picks the next game.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: The Miasma of the Void, Cool Ice, Part 1
programme.desc: The baseball game with D'Arby continues within DIO's mansion. For some reason, Jotaro starts telling D'Arby what pitches he'll be throwing. D'Arby finds Jotaro's actions strange, but still believes he has the upper hand because of his Stand's abilities.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: The Miasma of the Void, Cool Ice, Part 2
programme.desc: After a long, hard journey, the group is suddenly faced with saying goodbye to a friend. Polnareff can't control his emotions and starts brandishing his sword toward an unseen enemy with very little success.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: The Miasma of the Void, Cool Ice, Part 3
programme.desc: Polnareff is pushed to his limits by Cool Ice's merciless attacks. As he awaits death, the dying Iggy manages to save him at the last minute. Polnareff then stabs Cool Ice in the head. Despite showing resilience to the attacks so far.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: DIO's World, Part 1
programme.desc: Polnareff finally comes face-to-face with DIO. Despite Polnareff's hostility, DIO offers to forgive him and allow the Frenchman to join his side again. Polnareff refuses, but for some reason, he cannot get any closer to DIO.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: DIO's World, Part 2
programme.desc: As night falls, the battle expands to encompass the whole city of Cairo. Amidst the melee, Kakyoin says he has a way to figure out DIO's Stand ability.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: DIO's World, Part 3
programme.desc: Thanks to Kakyoin, Joseph is able to figure out that DIO's Stand, "The World," has the power to stop time, but is quickly defeated by DIO. Jotaro then attacks The World with Star Platinum but is no match for DIO's power.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: With help from Polnareff as well as putting his own life on the line, Jotaro is finally able to land a blow on DIO. Finding the shriveled body of Joseph Joestar, Jotaro becomes enraged and wages his final, desperate battle with DIO!

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Jotaro Kujo! Meets Josuke Higashikata
programme.desc: In April 1999, Jotaro Kujo travels to a town in Japan called Morioh to find a young man named Josuke Higashikata, the secret love child of his grandfather, Joseph Joestar. Upon finding him, Jotaro is surprised to learn that Josuke also possesses a Stand.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Josuke Higashikata! Meets Angelo
programme.desc: Josuke informs Jotaro about his encounter with Angelo’s Stand. Deducing that the serial killer’s Stand is capable of entering people’s bodies, Jotaro tells Josuke over the phone to stay on high alert until he arrives at his home.

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden the Movie: Will of Fire

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: The Movie

programme.title: Boruto: Naruto the Movie
programme.desc: Sasuke appears before Naruto to warn him of impending danger. An inconceivable foe lies in wait as Sasuke, the Five Kage and Boruto, charge into another dimension!

programme.title: Boruto: Naruto the Movie
programme.desc: Sasuke appears before Naruto to warn him of impending danger. An inconceivable foe lies in wait as Sasuke, the Five Kage and Boruto, charge into another dimension!

programme.title: Alone
programme.desc: The remaining participants are worn thin as starvation and isolation become unbearable. One man faces a potentially deadly situation.

programme.title: Alone

programme.title: Great Greek Myths
programme.desc: To earn the title of Master of Olympus, Zeus took many important steps and overcame many challenges.

programme.title: Great Greek Myths
programme.desc: His first wife was Metis. His second, who was known as his wife on Olympus, was the jealous Hera.

programme.title: Great Greek Myths
programme.desc: Having become organizer of the world, Zeus entrusted the world of the sea to his brother Poseidon, and the underworld, or the kingdom of the dead, to Hades.

programme.title: Great Greek Myths
programme.desc: On certain evenings, the constellation of Lyra is visible in the skies.

programme.title: Great Greek Myths
programme.desc: Theseus was the fruit of dual paternity: Aegeus King of Athens slept with Aethra when she had just been raped by Poseidon, God of the Sea.

programme.title: Great Greek Myths
programme.desc: Taking revenge against Prometheus, Zeus created the first woman - the beautiful Pandora. He gave her a manipulative and deceptive character and subjected Prometheus to terrible torture.

programme.title: Great Greek Myths
programme.desc: Although they were the son and daughter of Zeus, Apollo and his twin sister Artemis were born under threats from the goddess Hera.

programme.title: Great Greek Myths
programme.desc: Zeus had a reputation for being a seducer of women. One day he lay with a mortal - Semele, the daughter of the king of Thebes. Their son Dionysus was brought up by nymphs.

programme.title: Great Greek Myths
programme.desc: Dedalus, a prominent Greek inventor, settled in Crete among King Minos’ court. Queen Pasiphaë, who had an all-consuming passion for a white bull, called upon his services.

programme.title: Great Greek Myths
programme.desc: The Goddess of War Athena was the wisest, most level-headed and rational deity. She was born out of Zeus’ skull, wearing a helmet and holding a spear.

programme.title: History in the Making
programme.desc: Artisans restore the M1 Garand rifle, create barrels and make old-school American sports balls.

programme.title: History in the Making
programme.desc: Craftspeople forge the Greek soldier's breastplate, use industrial wood engraving and create a fur top hat.

programme.title: History in the Making
programme.desc: Artisans recreate a Viking shield, handcraft an illuminated manuscript and make traditional, delicious cheese.

programme.title: History in the Making

programme.title: History in the Making
programme.desc: Artisans create the huge Bowie knife, the classic Windsor chair and early small-batch chocolate.

programme.desc: Artisans create a Viking spear, a blown glass dragon goblet and small batch Indian pale ale.

programme.title: History in the Making

programme.title: Great Greek Myths: The Odyssey
programme.desc: 10 years earlier, as the Greek warriors had just razed Troy.

programme.title: Great Greek Myths: The Odyssey

programme.title: Great Greek Myths: The Odyssey

programme.title: Great Greek Myths: The Odyssey

programme.title: Great Greek Myths: The Odyssey

programme.title: Great Greek Myths: The Odyssey

programme.title: Great Greek Myths: The Odyssey

programme.desc: When Germany began Europe’s WWII by invading Poland in 1939, China had already been fighting Imperial Japan for two years. Lasted from 1937-45 it cost 14 million Chinese lives.

programme.title: World War II: Total War

programme.title: World War II: Total War

programme.title: ¿Quién es quién?

programme.desc: Having completely lost his memory, Data is stranded on a primitive planet where the inhabitants fear he is carrying a deadly plague.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: While an alien archive transforms the Enterprise into its ancient society, Data is taken over by several different personalities from the extinct civilization.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: While experiencing empathic visions after an officer's mysterious suicide, Troi becomes romantically involved with Worf.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Picard and Data return to the Enterprise to discover that the entire crew has de-evolved into prehistoric beings.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Picard is forced to relocate American Indians from a planet they have settled, while a colonist causes Wesley to re-examine his future.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: A mysterious family friend arrives to help transform Worf's reluctant son Alexander into a warrior.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Picard learns that he has a son, and that the young man has been targeted for murder by an old enemy in search of revenge.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The lives of the Enterprise crew are endangered when the ship suddenly develops its own intelligence.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Ro Laren is forced to choose between her loyalty to Picard and her hatred toward Cardassia when she accepts an assignment to infiltrate the Maquis.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Picard finds himself travelling between the past, present, and future while attempting to prevent the destruction of humanity... by his own actions.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The new Starship Enterprise and its crew set out “to boldly go where no one has gone before." Their first mission is to explore the mystery surrounding the creation of the Farpoint station located on planet Deneb IV.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: A need to test herself leads Torres down a path of self-destruction.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: The Voyager crew discovers an alien training ground for the destruction of Earth.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Neelix balks at telling Naomi that her mother and others have gone missing on an away mission.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Fifteen years after making a horrible mistake, Kim attempts to rewrite history.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Seven experiences the Borg version of multiple personality disorder.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Torres is forced to put her life in the hands of a mortal enemy that uses biochemical secretions to give commands.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Paris is confined to the Brig after interfering with the affairs of an alien race.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Stranded on a desolate planet with a beautiful female, Tuvok struggles to ignore the emotions his Vulcan master taught him to suppress.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: The crew is in serious danger when all of their dreams seem to come true and home seems closer in sight.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: During a mission against the Borg, Seven of Nine is lured back to the Collective.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: When Seven is threatened by assimilation into the Collective, Janeway launches an all-out mission to rescue her.

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: Col. Young (Louis Ferreira) is plagued by a recurring vision wherein Destiny is attacked and destroyed by aliens. After placing the crew on high alert, he starts to feel that he may be losing his mind and questions his ability as the commander!

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: When Destiny comes upon a heavily damaged ship, Dr. Rush and Col. Young decide to make a dangerous space-suited expedition to the ship. But an unexpected turn of events leaves Dr. Rush and Col. Young stranded aboard the strange vessel.

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: Lucian Alliance prisoner Simeon escapes, creating a manhunt on a remote planet. But Homeworld Command orders he be captured alive, believing Simeon has valuable information. Simeon must be brought back to the Destiny before he kills or is killed.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: SG-1 discovers that Nirrti is mutating the inhabitants of an unexplored planet with a machine that rearranges their DNA. Captured in an attempt to stop her, O'Neill must find a way to escape before he and SG-1 are subjected to the same fate.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: General Hammond and the Pentagon are forced to reveal the existence of the Stargate to other world governments. Senator Kinsey suggests that General Hammond be relieved of his command and that the civilian-run NID oversee the Stargate program.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: SG-1 discovers three human survivors on an off-world planet who claim to be under attack by hostile aliens. While Carter helps repair the ship's computer, she learns that the survivors are hiding a secret…and things may not be all they seem.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Teal'c mysteriously begins to hallucinate and is haunted by visions of an existence where he is a human being. As his paranoia deepens, Teal'c must rely on the help of friend Daniel Jackson to determine where his dreams end...and his reality begins.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: SG-1 accompanies the X-53 on its voyage into deep space. When the ship drops out of hyperspace, SG-1 is stranded with no means of getting back to Earth. Their only option lies in exploring a nearby planet where a Stargate is thought to be located.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: SG-1 encounters a civilization desperate to be freed from the clutches of a Goa'uld. While on the planet, Jonas falls ill. His illness is diagnosed as a brain tumor but it gives him the ability to see the future...where SG-1 are walking into a trap!

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Daniel appears to O'Neill and alerts him that Anubis has located the Eye of Ra, an object of power hidden on Abydos. With Daniel's help, SG-1 find the Eye first. Determined to have it, Anubis threatens to destroy the planet unless they hand it over.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: As SG-1 begins its search for the Lost City, they discover that Jackson has been returned by the Ancients without any memory of who he was. While SG-1 tries to help him regain his memory, they discover that the Lost City is not on the same planet.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Anubis travels to Kelowna after discovering that it has mines of a more powerful source of energy that he can use to make his new weapon more destructive. The leaders of Kelowna contact SG-1 for their help, but make an ill-advised deal with Anubis.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: A 15-year-old infiltrates the SGC with the startling news that he is Colonel Jack O'Neill, having mysteriously reverse aged 30 years overnight. Possessing O'Neill's knowledge, exact DNA and, above all, his attitude, can he really be O'Neill?

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Through the help of Daniel, Teal'c visualizes that Rya'c and Bra'tac are being held prisoner in a Goa'uld death camp. With SG-1's help, Teal'c sets out to rescue his son and his mentor, but can he overcome his fears in time?

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: When Katara's desire to master Waterbending gets the best of her, the kids find themselves on the run from pirates.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Our heroes' friendship is tested when they meet Jet, a charismatic teenager leading a band of rebels who are fighting against the Fire Nation.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: When Aang and friends come to the rim of a giant canyon, they are asked to help guide two groups of refugees across. Aang quickly learns that this will be no easy task.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: A powerful storm brings up painful memories of the past - and puts everyone in jeopardy in the present.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: When Sokka and Katara get too sick to travel, Aang goes out on his own to find a cure for them. But he is captured by Zhao and held prisoner inside an impenetrable fortress.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Aang, Katara, and Sokka discover a village of people who are all reliant on a fortuneteller in their everyday lives - but they are so reliant that they are blind to the immanent danger they are all in.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Aang feels insecure when Katara and Sokka come across something that reminds them of home. Because Aang thinks his friends might leave him, he hides an important message which only leads to trouble.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Aang attempts to find a Firebending master to teach him while Katara learns that she possesses a special power.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: After hearing rumors about surviving Airbenders, the kids journey to the Northern Air temple to see for themselves. What they find there could spell disaster for all enemies of the Fire Nation.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: The kids reach the Northern Water tribe, and Aang and Katara look for a Waterbending Master as Sokka falls for a princess. Meanwhile, Zhao plans an attack and Zuko must find a way to continue his quest for the Avatar.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: The Northern Water Tribe braces itself for an attack by Admiral Zhao’s Fire Navy fleet. In the heat of battle, Aang struggles to defend the city. He wonders if there isn’t a better way to use his Avatar abilities.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Zhao’s invasion breaks through the outer wall of the Northern Water Tribe’s defenses, and he reveals a sinister plan. Aang goes to the spirit world for help – but will he return in time to stop Zhao and prevent the destruction of the Water Tribe?

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Aang and the group meet an Earth Kingdom general who wants to use Aang's powerful “Avatar State” as a weapon to defeat the Fire Nation.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: On their way to Omashu, the kids become lost in the treacherous "Cave of Two Lovers."

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Aang enters Omashu so he can learn Earthbending from King Bumi, but the city is in the hands of the Fire Nation!

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: When the kids end up in a mysterious and strange swamp, their fears are exposed. And Aang learns about being "connected to the Earth" from an unlikely teacher.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Aang must clear up a wave of anti-Avatar sentiment and atone for something he did in the past.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Aang discovers a possible Earthbending mentor at an underground tournament.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender

programme.desc: As the kids are pursued relentlessly by a mysterious machine, their exhaustion puts them at each other's throats.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Aang discovers a colossal Fire Nation invention heading for Ba Sing Se, and the kids must stop it before it destroys the great wall that protects the city from invasion.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Aang and the kids finally arrive in Ba Sing Se to see the Earth King, only to find mysterious forces within the city conspiring to stop them.

programme.desc: Sheriff Bill Gillespie's daughter Lana learns that her old flame, Lee Thompson, has arrived in Sparta and may be illegally running guns to a local hunting store owner, Raymond Mercer. He’s caught the attention of Lonnie Jamison, who fears the worst.

programme.desc: A homicide investigation turns into a federal case when a "corpse" creates a reign of terror at Community General. Amanda prepares for her autopsy on blood-soaked John Doe when he springs to life, putting a stranglehold on Amanda!

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: After heading out to a mountain cabin, Jesse goes missing, only to turn up five days later in Utah, claiming to have been abducted by aliens.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Amanda cruises into cyberspace during a spell of boredom and randomly enters the website "Welcome to Joanne's living room" for mindless entertainment.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Steve joins his troubled partner, Reggie Ackroyd, in a rehab facility for stressed-out cops. Reggie seems delusional and keeps blaming a murderer he caught for abducting his wife and daughter, and Steve encourages him.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine
programme.desc: When Ritchie stops telling Christine he loves her, she is devastated and asks Richard to have a baby with her so she can have a new child to love her the way Ritchie used to.

programme.title: The Exes

programme.desc: Haskell plans to attend a big event honoring him for his past bowling glory, but is quarantined with Phil and Stuart. Holly secretly rewrites Eden's college paper and almost destroys her dream

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez plays host to Don Xavier Molines, a family friend during his childhood in Spain, and his daughter Consuella. Morticia's hospitality is put to the test when Consuella reveals that she has been promised in marriage to Gomez since childhood.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Wednesday's and Pugsley's faith in Santa Claus is shaken, Uncle Fester is chosen to back up Santa in case the real St. Nick is too busy to come. However, Fester-Santa gets stuck in the chimney, so each of the other adults fills in for him.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Fester is so smitten upon receipt of a photo of his love, a bearded carnival lady, that he borrows stamp money to mail her a proposal. Morticia dons a beard and poses as the mother to convince Fester that he will have to work to support a wife.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Because she thinks Fester (Jackie Coogan) and Grandmama (Blossom Rock) are spoiling the children, Morticia (Carolyn Jones) hires a governess. Insulted, Fester paints a white line down the center of the Addams house, dividing it in half.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez see Fester conferring with TV muscleman Jack LaGrann (Jack LaLanne), and think that Fester is planning a television career. However, Uncle Fester confides to Lurch that he has to go on a secret diet and exercise.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez find Grandfather Pegleg's treasure map and summon Captain Grimby. They hope to charter his boat for the treasure hunt. But after meeting the Captain, Morticia is careful to keep the nature of the mission secret.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Ophelia Frump is madly in love with Horatio Bartholomew, the man who has everything, except the truth about her relatives. Morticia, not convinced by Bartholomew, persuades playboy Cousin Itt to stir the embers of his past romance with Ophelia.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Pugsley shocks his parents when he gives up his new atomic reactor as kid stuff and announces that he wants to find his own job. His first try is as a medical assistant to Dr. Bird. He turns up, scalpel in hand, ready to help during an operation.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandma Frump (guest star Margaret Hamilton), comes to the mistaken conclusion that her daughter, Morticia (Carolyn Jones), and Gomez (John Astin) plan to pack her off to an old folks home. Actually, they plan to send her to a beauty farm.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia, in order to be part of the National Beautification Program, decides to become a home decorator and offers her services to the neighbors. Next door neighbor, and insurance agent, Joe Digby hires Morticia in hopes of selling them insurance.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Ophelia taunts Uncle Fester into announcing that he is going to join the Peace Corps. Fester feels he's a cinch to be accepted because Gomez plans to pull strings in Washington on his behalf. The entire family agrees to help him study for the exam.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Allyn Joslyn guest-stars as Sam Hilliard, a former truant officer who now heads a private school where Wednesday and Pugsley are enrolled. When Hilliard breaks under the strain of dealing with the Addams children, Gomez buys the school.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Dr. Marvin P. Gunderson is summoned to examine Kitty Kat, the ailing lion pet of the Addams Family. Morticia decides that it is the doctor who needs help. To build his confidence, human members of the family pretend to be ill so he can effect cures.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's concern that Lurch is overworked leads Gomez to the operating table to assemble a custom-built secondary butler. Lurch lets the robot do all the work and then begins to feel that he isn't needed anymore.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Uncle Fester incinerates the family's stuffed bear with his flamethrower, Morticia reports the accident to the insurance company. Mr. Henson the head of the company, sends his assistant, Mr. Digby, to handle the case.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch suffers from unrequited love over Tiny Trivia (guest star Diane Jergens), Morticia's visiting school chum who only has eyes for show business. The entire family decides to try to turn their stolid butler into a new personality.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Ophelia laments that she has been jilted, Morticia suggests a career as an alternative to marriage. She tries chemistry first (with explosive results) then turns to operatic singing. Cousin Itt is summoned to coach her to stardom.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez decide to keep Wednesday and Pugsley home from school after Morticia sees the fairy tales they have to read. When the truant officer comes to investigate, he is shocked at what he finds.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia calls a psychiatrist after she fears Pugsley is becoming normal after he abandons his pet octopus for a puppy and is seen wearing a Boy Scout uniform, playing with a baseball bat, and helping an old lady cross the street.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester, who has become lonely, convinces Gomez and Morticia that it is time for him to find a bride. He decides to put an ad in the newspaper, looking for love. But things go awry when a door-to-door saleswoman comes by.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Election fever grips the Addams household, as Gomez (John Astin) supports the council candidate whose campaign promise is to drain the town's disgusting bogs. Morticia (Carolyn Jones), who likes "the lovely bogs," labels the candidate an extremist.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Pugsley and Wednesday start a row at a party when their gift of a tarantula upsets Harold, the birthday boy. Harold's parents insist that the Addams children lack breeding and, therefore, are no longer allowed to play with their son.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: After Pugsley befriends Gorgo, a circus gorilla, Gorgo decides to follow Pugsley and Gomez home, where is accepted as one of the family. But Gorgo gives Morticia's tea guests, the Ladies League members, quite a shock.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: A pair of bank robbers are welcomed as Halloween trick-or-treaters by Morticia and Gomez. The creepy atmosphere of the house, Morticia's smoldering holiday punch, and Lurch's ominous presence impel the crooks to abandon their plans.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Lionel Barker, a former suitor of Morticia's, shows up, Gomez is jealous. But he's soon calmed when he learns that Barker is after Mildred, the new maid. The Addamses then discover that Barker is a con man--after Mildred's money, not her love.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Newlyweds move in next door. But the honeymoon loses its tranquility when Uncle Fester enters their house through a tunnel and they flee in terror at the sight of Lurch, Grandmama sharpening her ax, and Morticia and Gomez bathing the octopus.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The family faces a crisis when Wednesday packs her spider and runs away (after being scolded for playing with Uncle Fester's TNT). When they try to file a missing person report, a detective is anxious to retire early due to their story.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: While the captain's daughter falls for Gopher, a book publisher flips a page in the book of love when trying to sign a burly author who happens to be accompanied by his attractive niece. Plus, an unusual couple looks for treasure.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: Crew members become matchmakers when a man offers a handsome reward to anyone who can find him a good woman. Plus, a teen girl traveling with her mother faces potential humiliation when she runs into a former boyfriend.

programme.title: The Love Boat

programme.desc: The captain and his crew suspect that a beautiful woman is trying to kill her millionaire husband, while a glamorous divorcee (Eva Gabor) tries to get reacquainted with her son, who prefers the company of his father.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: A mother and daughter are shocked to see the girl's long-lost father entertaining passengers as the cruise comedian. Plus, a teenager pursues Gopher and drastically changes her appearance to try and catch his eye.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: When a former medical-school friend (James Noble) becomes the center of attention, Doc wonders if he made the right career decision. Meanwhile, a reticent computer genius tries to win the affection of a woman who has eyes for another man

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: To the astute detective and forensic specialist, the biggest clues often hide in plain sight, and what seems trivial to some is in reality Critical Evidence.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Psychological Profiling: Journey into the dark recesses and calculated madness present only in our worst nightmares…and in the minds of serial killers.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: In North Carolina, the home of a prominent couple becomes an unlikely scene of terrible bloodshed. Across the country, a California woman vanishes, worrying her family and the investigators trying to find her.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: It is difficult to convict a murderer if the body can't be found. But forensic science is finding ways to do it. Devious killers can think up many was to dispose of their victim's remains, but they are often no matches for investigators.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: 911 receives a desperate call in Fort Worth, Texas. A man's wife is shot. Forensic investigators search for clues in unlikely places, hoping the victim herself could provide information needed to determine how and why she died.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Investigators are always on the cutting edge of new forensic techniques that can help them solve cases more accurately. An experimental “brain fingerprinting” technique has already won the acquittal of a police officer accused of a drug charge.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A victim usually never foresees danger when the perpetrator turns out to be a friend or a lover. Science and microscopic evidence can unmask these killers and find justice for those who are Loved To Death.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Lies and deceit can often throw investigators off the trail of justice. But when hard evidence contradicts a killer's story, police must use the clues to piece together the truth.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: An abandoned car outside Philadelphia brings heartbreak to a family and terror to a community. A young woman is dead, the killer gone. But the marks of his passage remain.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Every family has its secrets, and sometimes blood relations lead to bloodshed. When money is the motive, murder can rip at the very foundation of marriage and family.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: When killers are driven by jealousy and desire, their desperation is evident in both the crime and their efforts to avoid detection. But forensic science can reveal even the slightest mistake to solve crimes of passion.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Poisoners are the most devious of killers, relying on stealth or their victim's trust in order to steal their lives. They're the most dangerous creatures in the world: smart assassins. And they usually don't stop at one kill.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: DNA Analysis: With the advent of DNA analysis, just a few microscopic cells found at a crime scene can be used to put a murder behind bars.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Years after a murder has been committed, investigators use advanced DNA analysis to shed new light on crimes that have gone unpunished for far too long.
